English: Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission gathers information on corruption occurring in Government and the public Sector from a variety of sources. These sources include members of the public, heads of government departments and agencies, officials working in both the public and private sectors and the media.
Kiswahili: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi inakusanya habari juu ya ufisadi unaotokea katika Serikali na Sekta ya umma kutoka vyanzo mbalimbali.
Dholuo: Commission mar Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (ECAC) choko weche e wi mibadhi ma timore e sirkal kod e sirkal kuom yore mopogore opogore.
Somali: Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa wuxuu macluumaad ku saabsan musuqmaasuqa ka dhaca dowladda iyo qaybta dadweynaha ka soo ururiyaa ilo kala duwan.

English: The reports can be made at the EACC headquarter (Integrity Center), our regional offices and all Huduma Centers countrywide.
Kiswahili: Ripoti zinaweza kufanywa katika makao makuu ya EACC (Mkutano wa Utimilifu), ofisi zetu za kikanda na vituo vyote vya Huduma kote nchini.
Dholuo: Ripot nyalo yudore e ofis maduong' mar EACC (Integrity Center), e ofisewa mag alwora, koda e kuonde duto ma Huduma yudoree e piny mangima.
Somali: Warbixinnada waxaa laga sameyn karaa xarunta EACC (Center Integrity), xafiisyadeena gobolka iyo dhammaan Xarumaha Huduma ee dalka oo dhan.

English: Since 2003, EACC has secured convictions in Court, enhanced financial investigations and recovered assets acquired from corruption as a deterrence strategy. This has been achieved through proactive disruptions, robust prosecution of recovery cases and enhanced use of Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR)
Kiswahili: Tangu 2003, EACC imepata hukumu mahakamani, imeongeza uchunguzi wa kifedha na ilipata mali zilizopatikana kutokana na ufisadi kama mkakati wa kuzuia. Hii imefanikiwa kupitia usumbufu wa kimkakati, utekelezaji wa kesi za upatikanaji wa haki na matumizi bora ya Suluhisho la Mabishano ya Mabadiliko (ADR)
Dholuo: Chakre higa mar 2003, EACC osemiyo kot ong'ado bura, osemiyo otim nonro e weche mag pesa kendo oseyudo mwandu ma ne oyudo kuom mibadhi kaka yo mar geng'o mibadhi.
Somali: Tan iyo 2003, EACC waxay maxkamadda ka heshay xukun, xoojisay baaritaano maaliyadeed iyo soo kabatay hanti laga helay musuqmaasuqa iyada oo loo marayo istaraatijiyad joojin ah. Tan waxaa lagu gaadhay iyada oo loo marayo faragelin ku saabsan, dacwad adag oo lagu soo oogay kiisaska soo kabashada iyo adeegga sare ee xalinta khilaafaadka ee kale (ADR)

English: The latest news and headlines from the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission.
Kiswahili: Habari za karibuni na vichwa vya habari kutoka Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi.
Dholuo: Weche manyien kod weche madongo moa e Commission for Ethics and Anti-Corruption.
Somali: Wararkii ugu dambeeyay iyo cinwaanada laga helay Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa.

English: Information can be provided to EACC in writing, by telephone or by presenting it personally to the Commission's Report Centre at Integrity Centre in Nairobi and any of our Regional Offices. The Commission's contact details are listed below. One can also pass on information anonymously to the Commission through the Anonymous Whistleblower's System on this Website.
Kiswahili: Habari inaweza kutolewa kwa EACC kwa maandishi, kwa simu au kwa kuwasilisha binafsi kwa Kituo cha Ripoti ya Tume katika Kituo cha Uadilifu katika Nairobi na yoyote ya ofisi zetu za kikanda. maelezo ya mawasiliano ya Tume ni hapa chini.
Dholuo: Weche inyalo chiw ne EACC e yo ma nondiki, kokalo kuom simo kata kuom chiwo weche e yo ma ng'ato owuon ne Commission's Report Centre e Integrity Centre e Nairobi kod e ofisewa mag alwora.
Somali: Macluumaadka waxaa loo siin karaa EACC qoraal ahaan, taleefanka ama adigoo si shaqsi ah u soo gudbinaya Xarunta Warbixinta ee Komishanka ee Xarunta Daacadnimada ee Nairobi iyo mid ka mid ah Xafiisyadeena Gobolka.

English: This system ensures that a person’s identity as a whistle blower is hidden and that their report remains confidential and can only be accessed by EACC.
Kiswahili: Mfumo huu unahakikisha kwamba utambulisho wa mtu kama whistleblower ni siri na kwamba ripoti yao inabaki kuwa ya siri na inaweza kupatikana tu na EACC.
Dholuo: Sirni miyo ng'ato bedo gi ng'eyo maling'ling' mar ng'at ma hulo weche, kendo miyo ripot mare bedo maling'ling' kendo en mana EACC kende ema nyalo yudo ripotno.
Somali: Nidaamkani wuxuu hubiyaa in aqoonsiga qofka sida qofka soo sheegaya wararka la qarinayo iyo in warbixintiisa ay tahay mid qarsoodi ah oo kaliya oo ay heli karto EACC.

English: The Commission has put in place various mechanisms to ensure that staff uphold integrity at all times.
Kiswahili: Tume imeanzisha mifumo mbalimbali ili kuhakikisha kwamba wafanyakazi huendelea kuwa waaminifu wakati wote.
Dholuo: Kuom ranyisi, ne oketo chenro mar rito tim makare mar jotich wetene.
Somali: Komishanku wuxuu sameeyay habab kala duwan si loo hubiyo in shaqaalaha ay ilaaliyaan daacadnimada waqti kasta.

English: Any wayward officers suspected to be engaging in corrupt conduct or other unethical practices should be reported to the Commission promptly.
Kiswahili: Afisa wowote wa uasi wanaoshukiwa kuwa na tabia mbaya au mazoea mengine yasiyo ya maadili wanapaswa kuripotiwa kwa haraka kwa Tume.
Dholuo: Owete gi nyimine ma nigi paro maok kare onego ochiw ripot mapiyo ne Commission kuom wach bedo gi timbe maricho kata timbe mamoko maok nyis luor.
Somali: Sarkaal kasta oo xadgudubka ah oo lagu tuhmo inuu ku lug leeyahay dhaqanka musuqmaasuqa ama dhaqan kale oo aan anshaxa lahayn waa in si dhakhso leh loo soo sheegaa Komishanka.

English: Such an approach must combine law enforcement, strengthening institutions, promoting good governance, and conducting public education.
Kiswahili: Njia hiyo inapaswa kuunganisha kutekeleza sheria, kuimarisha taasisi, kukuza utawala mzuri, na kuendesha elimu ya umma.
Dholuo: Yo ma kamano onego oriw lwedo chike, jiwo riwruoge, jiwo loch maber, koda puonjo ji.
Somali: Qaabkan waa inuu isku darayaa sharciga, xoojinta hay'adaha, horumarinta maamulka wanaagsan, iyo waxbarashada dadweynaha.

English: This Chapter requires persons seeking public office to be selected on the basis of personal integrity, competence and suitability.
Kiswahili: Sura hii inahitaji watu wanaotafuta nafasi za umma kuchaguliwa kwa msingi wa utimilifu wa kibinafsi, uwezo na kufaa.
Dholuo: Sula mar 10 nyaka 20 biro miyo joma dwaro bedo jotelo mag sirkal oyud thuolo mar bedo jotelo mag sirkal.
Somali: Cutubkan waxaa looga baahan yahay in dadka doonaya in ay qabtaan xilka dawladda lagu doorto iyadoo lagu saleynayo daacadnimada shaqsiyadeed, aqoonta iyo ku habboonida.

English: The Commission conducts sensitization for festival trainers guiding the development of scripts in various institutions and adjudicators to ensure integrity in the adjudication process.
Kiswahili: Tume hufanya ufahamu kwa ajili ya walimu wa tamasha kuongoza maendeleo ya maandishi katika taasisi mbalimbali na mahakimu ili kuhakikisha uadilifu katika mchakato wa mahakama.
Dholuo: Komisiono timo kinda mar konyo jogo matiego jopuonj mag festival mondo ong'e kaka ginyalo loso weche manie ndiko e riwruoge mopogore opogore kod joma loso bura mondo omi weche duto obed maler e bwo loch.
Somali: Komishanku wuxuu u qabtaa wacyi galinta tababarayaasha xafladaha, isagoo hagida u siinaya horumarinta qoraallada hay'adaha kala duwan iyo garsoorayaasha si loo hubiyo daacadnimada geedi socodka garsoorka.

English: This encourages the youth to uphold personal integrity and raise awareness on ethical conduct among their peers.
Kiswahili: Hilo huwachochea vijana kudumisha utimilifu wao na kuwajulisha wenzao kuhusu mwenendo mzuri.
Dholuo: Mano jiwo rowere mondo osik ka gimakore gi tim makare kendo gibed gi paro mowinjore e kind mbesegi.
Somali: Tani waxay dhalinyarada ku dhiiri gelisaa inay ilaaliyaan daacadnimada shaqsiyadeed iyo inay u ogaadaan sida ay dabeecadda wanaagsan u leeyihiin asxaabtooda.

English: The courses offered at the Academy seek to ensure that ethics and integrity become values lived by everyone within an organization; that service delivery is optimal and that employees offer professional service upholding public trust and that the principle of common good vis a vis private interest or advantage is upheld.
Kiswahili: Kozi zinazotolewa katika Chuo cha elimu zinalenga kuhakikisha kwamba maadili na uadilifu huwa thamani zinazoishiwa na kila mtu ndani ya shirika; kwamba kutoa huduma ni bora na kwamba wafanyakazi kutoa huduma ya kitaalamu kuimarisha imani ya umma na kwamba kanuni ya mema ya pamoja dhidi ya masilahi binafsi au faida ni kuhimiliwa.
Dholuo: Puonj ma ipuonjo e skul dwaro ni timbe mabeyo kod tim makare obed kido ma ji duto manie riwruok nyalo bedogo; mondo omi jotich duto thuolo mar chiwo tich maber, kendo mondo giti ne jotichgi e yo ma miyo ji geno kendo mondo omi ji duto oyud ber kuom wach moro ma gihero.
Somali: Koorsooyinka lagu bixiyo Akadeemiyada waxay u baahan yihiin in la hubiyo in anshaxa iyo daacadnimada ay noqdaan qiimo ay ku nool yihiin qof kasta oo ku jira urur; in adeegga la siiyo uu yahay midka ugu fiican, iyo in shaqaalaha ay bixiyaan adeeg xirfadeed oo lagu kalsoon yahay dadweynaha iyo in la ilaaliyo mabda'a wanaagga guud ee danta ama faa'iidada gaarka loo leeyahay.

English: Commission officers themselves must exemplify integrity.
Kiswahili: Wafanyakazi wa Tume wenyewe wanapaswa kuonyesha utimilifu.
Dholuo: Owete gi nyimine ma tiyo ne Jehova e pinje duto nyaka bed ranyisi maber mar bedo joma luwo tim makare.
Somali: Saraakiisha Komishanka waa inay tusaale u noqdaan daacadnimada.

English: Various stakeholders must play their role for the fight against corruption to succeed.
Kiswahili: Ili kupambana na ufisadi kufanikiwe, wanaohusika mbalimbali lazima wafanye kazi yao.
Dholuo: Mondo lweny odhi maber, nyaka ji duto ma nigi paro mopogore opogore otim kinda mondo gikony e tieko mibadhi.
Somali: Si la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa uu u guuleysto waa in dhinacyada kala duwan ee daneeyayaasha ah ay doorkooda ka ciyaaraan.

English: EACC Commissioner Rose Mghoi Macharia said that, “it is the responsibility of all of us to provide services promptly, and to ensure efficient implementation of the development programmes and projects initiated by the Government”.
Kiswahili: Kamishna wa EACC Rose Mghoi Macharia alisema kuwa, "ni jukumu letu sote kutoa huduma haraka, na kuhakikisha utekelezaji mzuri wa mipango na miradi ya maendeleo iliyoanzishwa na Serikali".
Dholuo: Komisa mar EACC Rose Mghoi Macharia nowacho ni, en ting' marwa waduto chiwo kony mapiyo, kendo neno ni chenro mag dongruok kod chenro mag dongruok ma sirkal osechako tiyo e yo maber.
Somali: Guddoomiyaha EACC Rose Mghoi Macharia ayaa sheegtay in ay tahay masuuliyadeena in aan si deg deg ah u bixino adeegyada, iyo in la hubiyo in barnaamijyada horumarinta iyo mashaariicda ay bilaabeen dowladda si hufan loo hirgeliyo.

English: In his remarks, the chairman: The five-day training covered the following areas: Academy Policy Development Workshop Good governance requires that organizations big or small develop policies, procedures and systems that guide their day-to-day operations.
Kiswahili: Katika hotuba yake, mwenyekiti: Mafunzo ya siku tano yalifunika maeneo yafuatayo: Shule ya Maendeleo ya Sera ya Chuo cha Sayansi Utawala mzuri unahitaji mashirika makubwa au madogo kuunda sera, taratibu na mifumo inayoongoza shughuli zao za kila siku.
Dholuo: E wechene, jatelo: Tiegruok mar ndalo abich ne omako weche maluwogi: Academy Policy Development Workshop Locho maber dwaro ni riwruoge madongo kata matindo olos chike, chenro kod chenro mabiro tayo tijegi mapile.
Somali: Khudbadiisa, guddoomiyaha: Tababarka shanta maalmood ah wuxuu daboolay meelaha soo socda: Waxqabadka Horumarinta Siyaasadda Aqoonsiga Maamulka Wanaagsan wuxuu u baahan yahay in ururada waaweyn ama yaryar ay horumariyaan siyaasado, nidaamyo iyo nidaamyo tilmaamaya howlahooda maalinlaha ah.

English: Kindly note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted and will be required to submit Clearance/Compliance certificates from Ethics and Anti Corruption Commission; Directorate of Criminal Investigations; Kenya Revenue Authority; Higher Education Loans Board, and Credit Reference Bureau Ref.
Kiswahili: Tafadhali kumbuka kuwa wagombea walioorodheshwa tu watawasiliana na watahitajika kuwasilisha vyeti vya Usajili / Upatanaji kutoka kwa Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi; Kurugenzi ya Uchunguzi wa Jinai; Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya; Bodi ya Mikopo ya Elimu ya Juu, na Ofisi ya Ufafanuzi wa Mikopo Ref.
Dholuo: Ng'e ni joma oket e list mar joma biro yudo thuolo mar dhi e skundno kende ema ibiro tudorigo kendo ibiro dwar ni gimiye osetifiket mar yie kod luwo chike mag Commission for Ethics and Anti-Corruption; Directorate of Criminal Investigations; Kenya Revenue Authority; Higher Education Loans Board, kod Credit Reference Bureau Ref.
Somali: Fadlan ogow in kaliya musharixiinta liiska gaaban la xiriiri doono loona baahan doono inay soo gudbiyaan shahaadooyinka ogolaanshaha / waafaqsanaanta ka socda Guddiga anshaxa iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa; Agaasinka baaritaanka dambiyada; Hay'adda dakhliga Kenya; Guddiga amaahda waxbarashada sare, iyo Xafiiska tixraacyada amaahda Ref.

English: He also committed to advancing AAACA’s flagship legacy project, the Africa Anti-Corruption Studies and Research Centre (CEREAC), which seeks to strengthen research, training, and knowledge-sharing among anti-corruption agencies across Africa.
Kiswahili: Pia alijitolea kuendeleza mradi wa kiongozi wa AAACA, Afrika ya kupambana na ufisadi Mafunzo na Kituo cha Utafiti (CEREAC), ambayo inatafuta kuimarisha utafiti, mafunzo, na ushirikiano wa maarifa kati ya mashirika ya kupambana na ufisadi kote Afrika.
Dholuo: Bende ne ochiwore mar dhi nyime gi tich mar AAACA mar timo nonro kod timo nonro e wi mibadhi, ma en Africa Anti-Corruption Studies and Research Centre (CEREAC), ma dwaro jiwo timo nonro, tiegruok, kod pogo ng'eyo e kind riwruoge ma kedo gi mibadhi e Afrika duto.
Somali: Waxa kale oo uu ka go'an yahay horumarinta mashruuca ugu weyn ee AAACA, Xarunta Cilmi-baarista iyo Cilmi-baarista Ka-hortagga Musuqmaasuqa ee Afrika (CEREAC), kaas oo doonaya inuu xoojiyo cilmi-baarista, tababarka, iyo wadaagista aqoonta ee u dhexeeya hay'adaha ka-hortagga Musuqmaasuqa ee Afrika.

English: Purpose of establishing the Academy: The Academy is set to provide specialized ethics, integrity, Leadership, Good Governance and Anti- Corruption training to both the public and private sector institutions in the country and the region.
Kiswahili: Kusudi la kuanzisha Chuo: Chuo hicho kinakusudia kutoa mafunzo maalum ya maadili, uadilifu, uongozi, utawala mzuri na kupambana na ufisadi kwa taasisi za sekta ya umma na binafsi katika nchi na mkoa.
Dholuo: Gimomiyo ne ochak skul: Skul mar skul ne dhi chiwo tiegruok e weche mag timbe mabeyo, luwo tim makare, tayo loch, tayo loch maber, kod kedo gi mibadhi ne riwruoge mag sirkal kod mag sirkal e pinyno kod e alworano.
Somali: Ujeedada aasaaska Aqoonsiga: Aqoonsiga waxaa loo qorsheeyay in lagu siiyo tababar khaas ah oo ku saabsan anshaxa, daacadnimada, hoggaanka, maamulka wanaagsan iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa hay'adaha dawladda iyo kuwa gaarka loo leeyahay ee dalka iyo gobolka.

English: The IAO will serve as secretary to their respective Corruption Prevention Committees /Integrity Committees The National Integrity Academy Joins Hands with County Governments to train Integrity Champions The National Integrity Academy in partnership with EACC’s Upper Coast Regional Office rolled out a one-week Integrity Assurance Officers training for 30 Kilifi County Ward administrators.
Kiswahili: IAO itafanya kazi kama katibu wa Kamati zao za Kuzuia Ufisadi / Kamati za Uadilifu The National Integrity Academy inashirikiana na serikali za kaunti kuzoeza washindi wa uadilifu The National Integrity Academy kwa kushirikiana na Ofisi ya Wilaya ya Upper Coast ya EACC ilizindua mafunzo ya Afisa wa Uhakikisho wa Uadilifu ya wiki moja kwa wasimamizi wa Wilaya 30 wa Kilifi County.
Dholuo: IAO biro tiyo kaka jagoro e komiti mag geng'o mibadhi / komiti mag luwo tim makare mag sirkal. National Integrity Academy oriwore gi sirkal mag county e tiego jotelo mag luwo tim makare. National Integrity Academy e riwruok gi EACC's Upper Coast Regional Office, ne oloso tiegruok mar jumbe achiel mar tiego jotelo ma miyo ji duto bedo gi winjruok maber gi sirkal mar county mar Kilifi.
Somali: IAO waxay u adeegi doontaa sida xoghayaha guddiyada ka hortagga musuq maasuqa / guddiyada daacadnimada Qaranka Aqoonsiga Qaranka ayaa la wadaagaya dowladaha degmooyinka si ay u tababaraan horyaalada daacadnimada Aqoonsiga Qaranka ee Daacadnimada oo iskaashi la leh Xafiiska Gobolka Xeebta Sare ee EACC ayaa bilaabay tababar hal usbuuc ah oo loogu talagalay Saraakiisha Dammaanadda Daacadnimada 30 maamulayaasha degmada Kilifi.

English: 26.08.19 The Academy, which is the training arm of the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission, aims to promote a culture of integrity in all sectors of society.
Kiswahili: 26.08.19 Chuo hicho, ambacho ni mkono wa mafunzo wa Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi, inakusudia kukuza utamaduni wa uadilifu katika sekta zote za jamii.
Dholuo: 26.08.19 Akademi mar Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission, ma en riwruok mar tiegruok mar Komiti mar Timbe Malong'o kod Migawo mar Kwedo Mibadhi, dwaro jiwo kit ngima mar luwo tim makare e yore duto mag oganda.
Somali: 26.08.19 Aqoonsiga, oo ah laanta tababarka ee Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa, wuxuu ujeedkiisu yahay in lagu horumariyo dhaqanka daacadnimada dhammaan qaybaha bulshada.

English: The purpose of the training, which was rolled out at Sunrise Resort and Spa in Mombasa, was to equip trainees with knowledge, skills and tools with which to promote ethics, integrity and good governance.
Kiswahili: Lengo la mafunzo hayo, ambayo yalianza katika Sunrise Resort and Spa huko Mombasa, ilikuwa kuwapa wahitimu ujuzi, ujuzi na zana za kukuza maadili, uadilifu na utawala mzuri.
Dholuo: Chenro mar tiegruok ma ne otim e Sunrise Resort and Spa e Mombasa, ne en chiwo joma ne tiegori gi rieko, lony kod gik ma ne ginyalo tiyogo e jiwo timbe mabeyo, luwo tim makare kod loch maber.
Somali: Ujeedada tababarka, oo lagu bilaabay Sunrise Resort and Spa ee Mombasa, ayaa ahaa in la siiyo tababarayaasha aqoonta, xirfadaha iyo aaladaha lagu horumarinayo anshaxa, daacadnimada iyo maamulka wanaagsan.

English: The Academy is set to provide specialized ethics, integrity, Leadership, Good Governance and Anti- Corruption training to both the public and private sector institutions in the country and the region.
Kiswahili: Chuo hicho kitatoa mafunzo ya kitaaluma ya maadili, uadilifu, uongozi, utawala mzuri na kupambana na ufisadi kwa taasisi za sekta ya umma na ya kibinafsi katika nchi na mkoa.
Dholuo: Skul mar Academy en mar chiwo tiegruok makende e weche mag timbe mabeyo, luwo tim makare, tayo loch, tayo loch maber, kod kedo gi mibadhi ne riwruoge mag sirkal koda mag jomamoko e pinyno koda e alworano.
Somali: Aqoonsigu wuxuu u diyaar garoobayaa inuu tababar khaas ah ku siiyo anshaxa, daacadnimada, hoggaanka, maamulka wanaagsan iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa hay'adaha qaybaha dadweynaha iyo kuwa gaarka loo leeyahay ee dalka iyo gobolka.

English: The Academy serves six main target groups: The Academy aims to empower state and non-state actors on matters ethics and integrity in order to: The establishment of the National Integrity Academy is premised on best practice and standards.
Kiswahili: Academy hutumikia vikundi kuu sita lengo: Academy inakusudia kuwawezesha wanariadha wa serikali na wasio wa serikali juu ya masuala ya maadili na uadilifu ili: Uanzishwaji wa National Uadilifu Academy ni msingi wa mazoezi bora na viwango.
Dholuo: Akademiyo tiyo ne grube auchiel madongo: Akademi dwaro miyo jotelo mag sirkal kod maok mag sirkal teko e weche mag timbe kod luwo tim makare mondo:
Somali: Aakadeemiyadu waxay u adeegtaa lix kooxood oo muhiim ah: Aakadeemiyadu waxay ujeedkeedu yahay inay awood u siiso daneeyayaasha dowladda iyo kuwa aan dowladda ahayn arrimaha anshaxa iyo daacadnimada si loo sameeyo: Aasaaska Aakadeemiyadda Daacadnimada Qaranka waxaa lagu aasaasay dhaqanka ugu wanaagsan iyo heerarka.

English: The IAO will serve as secretary to their respective Corruption Prevention Committees /Integrity Committees The National Integrity Academy Joins Hands with County Governments to train Integrity Champions The Academy, which is the training arm of the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission, aims to promote a culture of integrity in all sectors of society.
Kiswahili: IAO itatumika kama katibu wa Kamati zao za Kuzuia Ufisadi / Kamati za Uadilifu The National Integrity Academy inashirikiana na serikali za wilaya kuzoeza washindi wa Uadilifu The Academy, ambayo ni mkono wa mafunzo wa Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi, inakusudia kukuza utamaduni wa uadilifu katika sekta zote za jamii.
Dholuo: IAO biro tiyo kaka jagoro e komiti mag geng'o mibadhi / komiti mag luwo tim makare mag oganda. National Integrity Academy riwore gi sirkande mag gweng' mondo otieg jotelo mag mibadhi.
Somali: IAO waxay u adeegi doontaa sida xoghayaha guddiyada ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa / guddiyada daacadnimada ee kala duwan Akadeemiyada Daacadnimada Qaranka waxay la shaqeysaa dowladaha degmooyinka si ay u tababaraan horyaalada daacadnimada Akadeemiyadani, oo ah laanta tababarka ee Guddiga anshaxa iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa, waxay ujeedkeedu yahay in lagu horumariyo dhaqanka daacadnimada dhammaan qaybaha bulshada.

English: KLIF Sectors and Stakeholders There are twenty(20) sectors under KLIF , drawn from both the public and private as follows: The Citizens are also identified as stakeholders for their role in public participation, demand for transparency, accountability and good governance.
Kiswahili: Sekta na Wadau wa KLIF Kuna sekta ishirini ((20) chini ya KLIF, iliyochukuliwa kutoka kwa umma na binafsi kama ifuatavyo: Raia pia hujulikana kama wadau kwa jukumu lao katika ushiriki wa umma, mahitaji ya uwazi, uwajibikaji na utawala mzuri.
Dholuo: Sectors and Stakeholders KLIF nigi grube piero ariyo (20) ma gin grube mag ji duto kod mag ji duto: Oganda bende ipimo kaka joma nigi paro kaluwore gi migawo ma gin-go e miyo ji duto obed gi thuolo mar timo gik moko, dwaro ni gibed gi rieko, kendo gibed gi bura makare.
Somali: KLIF waaxyaha iyo daneeyayaasha Waxaa jira labaatan ((20) waaxyood oo hoos yimaada KLIF, oo laga soo qaatay dadweynaha iyo kuwa gaarka loo leeyahay sida soo socota: Muwaadiniinta ayaa sidoo kale loo aqoonsan yahay inay yihiin daneeyayaal doorkooda ka qaybgalka dadweynaha, codsiga caddaaladda, xisaabtanka iyo maamulka wanaagsan.

English: X – Liability Expected Outcome Attitude change among youth and generational transformation in Kenya leading to reduced incidences of corruption Increased number of youth actively participating in decision making, governance and anti-corruption processes Improved access to critical public services Increased number of youth taking up positions of leadership Structure of and roles in the clubs are clearly outlined in Manual for the establishment of Integrity Clubs.

Somali: X  Xisaab celinta natiijooyinka la filayo Isbeddelka niyadda dhalinyarada iyo isbeddelka jiilka ee Kenya oo horseeda in la yareeyo dhacdooyinka musuqmaasuqa Tirada dhalinyarada si firfircoon uga qaybqaata go'aaminta, maamulka iyo geedi socodka ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa Helitaanka adeegyada dadweynaha ee muhiimka ah ee loo helo Tirada dhalinyarada sii kordheysa ee qabta jagooyinka hoggaanka Qaab dhismeedka iyo doorka kooxaha waxaa si cad loogu qeexay Buugga aasaaska kooxaha daacadnimada.

English: The Commission has encountered such incidences where some people posing as officers of the Commission defraud unsuspecting members of the public purporting to be investigating corruption.
Kiswahili: Tume imepata matukio kama hayo ambapo watu fulani wanaojitambulisha kuwa maafisa wa Tume wanawadanganya watu wasio na mashaka na wanaodai kuwa wanachunguza ufisadi.
Dholuo: Oganda mang'eny ma ne timo tijno ne wuondo ji ma ne wacho ni gin jorit mar Commission mondo otimnegi nonro kuom weche mag mibadhi.
Somali: Komishanku wuxuu la kulmay dhacdooyin noocaas ah halkaasoo dad qaar oo isu dhigaya saraakiil ka tirsan Komishanku ay khiyaanaynayaan xubno ka mid ah dadweynaha aan waxba ka shakisan oo sheegta inay baarayaan musuqmaasuqa.

English: In this regard, members of the public are encouraged to provide information touching on the integrity of such persons to the Commission or any other body considering them for appointment or election to public office.
Kiswahili: Katika suala hili, washiriki wa umma wanatiwa moyo kutoa taarifa kuhusu uadilifu wa watu hao kwa Tume au kwa vyombo vingine vyote vinavyowafikiria kwa ajili ya uteuzi au uchaguzi wa ofisi za umma.
Dholuo: E wi mano, ijiwo ji mondo ochiw weche motudore gi ratiro mar jogo ne Commission kata ne riwruok moro amora ma nono ka be gibiro ketogi e migepe mag sirkal kata yierogi.
Somali: Arrintan la xiriira, dadka guud waxaa lagu dhiiri geliyaa inay macluumaad ku saabsan daacadnimada dadkaas u gudbiyaan Komishanka ama hay'ad kale oo iyaga u tixgelinaya magacaabista ama doorashada xilka dawladda.

English: EACC is enhancing its national presence by opening more regional offices in order to monitor corruption at County levels in addition to the implementation of proactive county advisories focusing on strong systems and prudent use of public resources.
Kiswahili: EACC inaongeza uwepo wake wa kitaifa kwa kufungua ofisi zaidi za kikanda ili kufuatilia ufisadi katika ngazi ya Wilaya pamoja na utekelezaji wa ushauri wa wilaya wa kuongoza ambao unalenga mifumo yenye nguvu na matumizi ya busara ya rasilimali za umma.
Dholuo: EACC medo jiwo riwruok mar piny mangima kuom yawo ofise mang'eny mag alwora mondo omany riekni mag mibadhi e wi County, kendo keto e tich paro ma ok kare ma jiwo chenro motegno kod tiyo gi mwandu mag sirkal e yo mariek.
Somali: EACC waxay xoojineysaa joogitaankeeda qaranka iyadoo furaysa xafiisyo badan oo gobolleed si loo kormeero musuqmaasuqa heerka degmooyinka marka lagu daro hirgelinta talobixinnada degmooyinka ee horumarsan oo diiradda saaraya nidaamyada adag iyo isticmaalka taxaddar leh ee kheyraadka dadweynaha.

English: They also committed to reinforcing collaboration mechanisms to maximize their collective impact in addressing governance challenges.
Kiswahili: Pia walijitolea kuimarisha mifumo ya ushirikiano ili kuongeza athari zao za pamoja katika kushughulikia changamoto za utawala.
Dholuo: Bende ne gichiwore mar jiwo yore mag tiyo kanyachiel mondo gitiek chandruoge ma yudo dhano e bwo loch.
Somali: Waxay sidoo kale ka go'an yihiin inay xoojiyaan farsamooyinka iskaashiga si loo kordhiyo saameyntooda wadajirka ah ee wax ka qabashada caqabadaha maamulka.

English: This could be for A link must never be included on the public service site or within the editorial content of a commercial site in return for cash, services or any other consideration in kind.
Kiswahili: Hii inaweza kuwa kwa ajili ya kiungo kamwe lazima kuingizwa katika tovuti ya huduma ya umma au ndani ya maudhui ya uhariri wa tovuti ya kibiashara kwa malipo ya fedha, huduma au malipo mengine yoyote ya asili.
Dholuo: Mano nyalo timore nikech tudruok ok onego obedie e websait mar tij lendo kata e weche mag otas mar websait mar ohala nikech pesa, tije, kata gimoro amora ma ng'ato nyalo chulo.
Somali: Tani waxay noqon kartaa in link aan marnaba lagu darin bogga adeegga dadweynaha ama qoraalka bogga ganacsiga si loogu bedelo lacag caddaan ah, adeegyo ama wax kasta oo kale oo ku saabsan.

English: All links on the BBC Public Service site or on the editorial pages of a BBC Commercial site must be editorially justifiable and suitable for the intended audience â particularly children.
Kiswahili: Viungo vyote kwenye tovuti ya Huduma ya Umma ya BBC au kwenye kurasa za wahariri wa tovuti ya kibiashara ya BBC lazima iwe na uhalali wa wahariri na inafaa kwa watazamaji wanaotarajiwa - haswa watoto.
Dholuo: Weche duto manie websait mar BBC Public Service kata e ite mag weche mag ot mar BBC Commercial websait nyaka bed weche ma nyalo miyo weche mag ot mondik e websaitno obed maler kendo mowinjore gi joma idwaro winjo - to moloyo nyithindo.
Somali: Dhammaan xiriiriyeyaasha ku yaal bogga Adeegga Dadweynaha ee BBC ama bogagga tifaftiraha ee bogga ganacsiga ee BBC waa inay ahaadaan kuwo tifaftiraha ah oo ku habboon dhagaystayaasha la doonayo - gaar ahaan carruurta.

English: (See Editorial Guidelines Section 15 Independence from Commercial and other External Interests 15.4.22 ) Public Services must not endorse or promote any other organisation, or its products, services or trademarks, so great care must be taken when linking to any site in order not to give the impression that the BBC is doing so.
Kiswahili: (Ona Mwongozo wa Uhariri Sehemu ya 15 Uhuru kutoka kwa Biashara na maslahi mengine ya nje 15.4.22) Huduma za umma haipaswi kuidhinisha au kukuza shirika lolote lingine, au bidhaa zake, huduma au alama za biashara, hivyo lazima uangalie sana wakati wa kuunganisha kwenye tovuti yoyote ili kutoa hisia kwamba BBC inafanya hivyo.
Dholuo: (Ne weche moler e bwo wich mar 15 (Rapar mar 15) Bedo maonge gi ratiro mar tiyo gi weche mag ohala kod weche mamoko ma kelo ber mar oko 15.4.22) Tij sirkal ok onego oriw lwedo kata dhi nyime gi tije mag riwruok moro amora, kata tije, tije, kata alama mag ohala, omiyo, dwarore ni itang' ahinya sama itiyo gi weche mag intanet mondo kik inyis ni BBC timo kamano.
Somali: (Eeg Tilmaamaha Tifaftiraha Qeybta 15 Xiriirka ka ah Ganacsiga iyo danaha kale ee dibadda 15.4.22) Adeegyada dadweynaha waa inaysan taageerin ama dhiirrigelin hay'ad kale, ama alaabteeda, adeegyada ama calaamadaha ganacsiga, sidaas darteed waa in si taxadar leh loo taxaddaraa marka la isku xiro bog kasta si aan loo muujiyo in BBC ay sidaas sameyneyso.

English: BBC Public Service sites should not normally link direct to pages whose main purpose is transactional e.g.
Kiswahili: Tovuti za Huduma ya Umma ya BBC haipaswi kwa kawaida kuunganisha moja kwa moja na kurasa ambazo lengo kuu ni shughuli kwa mfano.
Dholuo: Websait mag tije mag sirkal mag BBC ok onego oriw achiel kachiel gi ite ma nigi tich maduong' mar timo ohala, kaka
Somali: Goobaha adeegga dadweynaha ee BBC-da sida caadiga ah waa inaysan si toos ah ugu xiriirin bogagga ujeedadoodu ugu weyn tahay macaamil ganacsi tusaale ahaan.

English: Links from individual pages on the Public Service site to the BBC's Commercial sites must be editorially justified.
Kiswahili: Viungo kutoka kurasa za kibinafsi kwenye tovuti ya Huduma ya Umma kwa tovuti za kibiashara za BBC lazima ziwe na uhalali wa kihariri.
Dholuo: Weche mawuok e ite mag Websait mar Tij Lendo mag Piny nyaka websait mag BBC mag Tij Lendo nyaka bed gi weche manyiso ni wechego gin adier.
Somali: Xiriirada laga helo bogagga shaqsiyadeed ee bogga Adeegga Dadweynaha ee internetka ee BBC-da ee ku yaal bogagga ganacsiga waa inay ahaadaan kuwo qoraal ahaan lagu caddaynayo.

English: Kanini Kega warns UDA will be buried in Ol Kalou by-election on July 16.
Kiswahili: Kanini Kega anaonya kuwa UDA itazikwa katika uchaguzi wa kipekee wa Ol Kalou Julai 16.
Dholuo: Kanini Kega osiemo ni UDA ibiro yik e yiero mar Ol Kalou tarik 16 dwe mar Julai.
Somali: Kanini Kega ayaa ka digay in UDA lagu aaso doorashada Ol Kalou 16-ka July.

English: Kipipiri MP Wanjiku Muhia urges supporters to pause fundraising after IEBC fine for inflammatory remarks, highlighting a tense by-election between DCP and UDA.
Kiswahili: Mjumbe wa Kipipiri Wanjiku Muhia anawahimiza wafuasi wake kusimamisha mkusanyiko wa fedha baada ya faini ya IEBC kwa maoni ya kuchochea, akisisitiza uchaguzi wa kipekee wa mgogoro kati ya DCP na UDA.
Dholuo: Jalup DPR ma Wanjiku Muhia jiwo jolupne mondo owe tij choko pesa bang' ka IEBC oseng'ado mar chulo kuor nikech weche ma ne giwacho, ka giwacho ni DCP gi UDA ne nigi ywaruok e kindgi.
Somali: Xildhibaan Wanjiku Muhia oo ka tirsan xisbiga Kipipiri ayaa ku booriyay taageerayaashiisa inay joojiyaan ururinta lacag bixinta kadib markii ay ganaax ku gashay IEBC faallooyin kacdoon ah, taasoo muujineysa doorasho aan kala sooc lahayn oo xiiso leh oo u dhexeysa DCP iyo UDA.

English: Former deputy president Rigathi Gachagua warns Ol Kalou residents to avoid a newly allocated train, labelling it a looming disaster amid by-election tensions.
Kiswahili: Makamu wa rais wa zamani Rigathi Gachagua anaonya wakazi wa Ol Kalou waepuke gari moshi jipya, akiitangaza kama janga linalotarajiwa katikati ya mgogoro wa uchaguzi.
Dholuo: Jal ma ne en jalup machon mar pinyno, Rigathi Gachagua, osiemo jogweng' Ol Kalou mondo kik giwuog e gach reru ma ne oyudo oseyier manyienno, kendo owacho ni en masira ma biro timore e kinde ma weche biro bedo matek e kinde mag yiero.

Dholuo: Jatend DCP Rigathi Gachagua jiwo Irungu Kang'ata mondo kik odonj e yiero mar Ol Kalou, ka jiwo ni en kampen mar alwora mochung'ne weche mag alwora.

English: The IEP oversees the OGP Independent Reporting Mechanism by helping to ensure quality of the reviews, assess procedures and promote findings.
Kiswahili: IEP huangalia Mfumo wa Uripoti wa Uhuru wa OGP kwa kusaidia kuhakikisha ubora wa mapitio, kutathmini taratibu na kukuza matokeo.
Dholuo: IEP chiko chenro mar chiwo ripot maok mar sirkal kuom konyo e miyo paro mar ji ong'ere, nono chenro mag tich, kendo jiwo gik ma oseyud.
Somali: IEP waxay kormeeraan nidaamka warbixinta madax banaan ee OGP iyadoo gacan ka geysaneysa in la hubiyo tayada dib u eegista, qiimeynta nidaamyada iyo kor u qaadista natiijooyinka.

English: The OGP Values Check is an effort to ensure that new countries joining OGP adhere to the democratic governance norms and values set forth in the Open Government Declaration , and applies to governments wanting to join OGP.
Kiswahili: Uhakiki wa Thamani za OGP ni jitihada ya kuhakikisha kwamba nchi mpya zinazojiunga na OGP zinafuata kanuni na thamani za utawala wa kidemokrasia zilizowekwa katika Tangazo la Serikali ya wazi , na inatumika kwa serikali zinazotafuta kujiunga na OGP.
Dholuo: Nono nengo mag OGP en chenro mar neno ni pinje manyien madonjo e OGP luwo chike kod chike mag loch mar demokarasi ma ne oket e "Open Government Declaration " kendo en chenro mar sirkande madwaro donjo e OGP.
Somali: Hubaalinta Qiimaha OGP waa dadaal lagu xaqiijinayo in dalalka cusub ee ku biira OGP ay u hoggaansamaan heerarka iyo qiimaha maamulka dimuqraadiga ah ee lagu qeexay Bayaanka Xukuumadda Furan , waxaana lagu dabaqi karaa dowladaha doonaya inay ku biiraan OGP.

English: Please refer to the Eligibility Criteria page for more details and a breakdown on the specific scoring methodologies used to assess both dimensions of OGP eligibility.
Kiswahili: Tafadhali tazama ukurasa wa Vipimo vya Eligibility kwa maelezo zaidi na ugawaji wa mbinu maalum za alama zinazotumiwa kutathmini vipimo vyote viwili vya eligibility ya OGP.
Dholuo: Mondo iyud weche momedore, ne ite mar Gik ma Dhano Duto Dwaro ni Otim, kod weche motudore gi yore ma ne itiyogo e nono yore ariyo mag yudo mich mar OGP.
Somali: Fadlan ka eeg bogga shuruudaha u qalma si aad u hesho faahfaahin dheeraad ah iyo kala-qaybinta hababka dhibcaha gaarka ah ee loo isticmaalo qiimeynta labada dhinac ee u qalma OGP.

English: Each government aspiring to join OGP should identify a lead ministry or government agency that will assume the responsibility for coordinating the government’s OGP process and activities and serve as the official contact point for the Partnership.
Kiswahili: Kila serikali inayotaka kujiunga na OGP inapaswa kutambua wizara kuu au wakala wa serikali ambaye atachukua jukumu la kuhariri mchakato na shughuli za serikali za OGP na kutumika kama mahali rasmi pa kuwasiliana na Ushirikiano.
Dholuo: Sirkal moro amora madwaro donjo e OGP onego oyier migawo kata riwruok mar sirkal mabiro kawo ting' mar chano chenro kod tije mag sirkal mar OGP kendo tiyo kaka kama riwruok mar OGP tudoree gi sirkal.
Somali: Dowlad kasta oo damacsan inay ku biirto OGP waa inay aqoonsataa wasaarad ama hay'ad dowladeed oo hogaaminaysa oo mas'uul ka noqon doonta isku-darka hanaanka iyo howlaha OGP ee dowladda waxayna u adeegi doontaa sidii barta rasmiga ah ee xiriirka Shirkadda.

English: Each government is expected to designate both a high-level and working-level point of contact (PoC).
Kiswahili: Kila serikali inatarajiwa kutangaza hatua ya mawasiliano ya kiwango cha juu na ya kiwango cha kazi (PoC).
Dholuo: Oganda duto biro bedo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi
Somali: Dowlad kasta ayaa la filayaa inay magacaabo labadaba heer sare iyo heer shaqo oo xiriir ah (PoC).

English: The former is normally a ministerial level official who represents the government formally and officially within the Partnership, while the latter is a senior civil servant with ability to coordinate across government and serve as the day-to-day contact point for the Support Unit.
Kiswahili: Wa kwanza ni afisa wa kiwango cha mawaziri ambaye huwakilisha serikali rasmi na rasmi ndani ya Ushirikiano, wakati wa pili ni afisa wa umma wa juu ambaye ana uwezo wa kuhariri katika serikali zote na kutumika kama hatua ya mawasiliano ya kila siku kwa Kitengo cha Msaada.
Dholuo: Jal ma ne ochung'ne ofis mar sirkal ne ochung'ne sirkal e yo ma ratiro kendo e yo ma ratiro e riwruok mar oganda, to jal ma ne ochung'ne ofis mar sirkal ne ochung'ne sirkal kendo ne en jatelo ma nigi nyalo mar riwo lwedo sirkal kendo tiyo kaka achiel kuom joma ne konyo e tije mapile.
Somali: Midka hore wuxuu caadi ahaan yahay sarkaal heer wasiir ah oo si rasmi ah iyo si rasmi ah ugu matala dowladda Shirkadda, halka kan dambe uu yahay sarkaal sare oo shaqaale ah oo awood u leh inuu isuduwiddo dowladda oo dhan isla markaana uu u adeego sidii barta maalinlaha ah ee la xiriirta Qeybta Taageerada.

English: If a country passes the Core Eligibility Criteria and Values Check and the government identified a lead ministry or agency, it should signal its intent to participate in OGP by sending a Letter of Intent, which formally expresses the government’s intention to join OGP.
Kiswahili: Ikiwa nchi imepitisha Ukaguzi wa Vituo na Thamani za Msingi na serikali imeamua wizara au wakala anayeongoza, inapaswa kuonyesha nia yake ya kushiriki katika OGP kwa kutuma barua ya nia, ambayo inaelezea rasmi nia ya serikali ya kujiunga na OGP.
Dholuo: Kapo ni piny moro oyudo ratiro mar yudo thuolo mar dhi e program mar OGP, kendo sirkal ofwenyo migawo kata riwruok ma biro tayo tijno, onego onyis ni odwaro dhi e OGP kuom oro barua mar dwaro mar dhi e OGP, ma nyiso ayanga ni sirkal dwaro donjo e OGP.
Somali: Haddii waddanku ka gudbo Qiimeynta Qiimaha iyo Tilmaamaha Qodobada iyo Qiimaha iyo dawladdu ay aqoonsato wasaarad ama hay'ad hogaaminaysa, waa inay calaamad u tahay ujeedkeeda inay ka qaybqaataan OGP adoo diraya Warqad ujeedo, oo si rasmi ah u muujineysa ujeedada dowladda ee ku biirista OGP.

English: Letters of Intent should confirm that the government is eligible to join OGP, specifically endorse the Open Government Declaration , describe past open government reforms, and specify the lead ministry or agency and at least the high-level point of contact that will be responsible for OGP within the government.
Kiswahili: Barua za nia zinapaswa kuthibitisha kuwa serikali ina haki ya kujiunga na OGP, kwa kuunga mkono hasa Tangazo la Serikali ya wazi, kuelezea mageuzi ya serikali ya wazi ya zamani, na kutaja wizara au wakala anayeongoza na angalau hatua ya mawasiliano ya kiwango cha juu ambayo itasimamia OGP ndani ya serikali.
Dholuo: Barupe mag dwaro onego onyis ni sirkal owinjore donjo e OGP, oher e yo makende ni OGP oler, oler lokruok ma ne otim e sirkal machon, kendo onyis migawo kata riwruok ma biro tayo sirkal kod kama biro bedoe kama biro tudore gi OGP e bwo sirkal.
Somali: Warqadaha ujeedooyinka waa inay xaqiijiyaan in dowladda ay xaq u leedahay inay ku biirto OGP, si gaar ah u taageeraan Bayaanka Xukuumadda Furan, ay qeexaan isbeddellada dowladda ee furan ee la soo dhaafay, waxayna qeexaan wasaaradda ama hay'adda ugu horeysa iyo ugu yaraan barta xiriirka heerka sare ee mas'uul ka noqon doonta OGP ee dowladda.

English: Letters of Intent should be addressed to the OGP Co-Chairs and sent to [email protected] , signed by a ministerial-level official from any ministry or agency within government, as long as that agency has received approval from the Head of State or Government to join OGP.
Kiswahili: Barua za nia zinapaswa kuelekezwa kwa Wasimamizi-Wana wa OGP na kutumwa kwa [email protected] , iliyosainiwa na afisa wa kiwango cha mawaziri kutoka wizara yoyote au wakala ndani ya serikali, kwa muda mrefu kama wakala huyo amepokea idhini kutoka kwa Mkuu wa Nchi au Serikali kujiunga na OGP.
Dholuo: Barupe mag dwaro onego oor ne jotelo ma jo OGP kendo oor ne [email protected] ma ondik gi jatelo moro mar migawo moro amora kata riwruok moro mar sirkal, ka en gi yie mar jatelo mar piny kata mar sirkal mar riwruokno.
Somali: Warqadaha ujeedada waa in loo diraa madaxda wada-xigeenka ee OGP loona diraa [email protected] oo uu saxiixay sarkaal heer wasiir ka ah wasaaradda ama hay'adda dowladda, illaa iyo inta hay'addaasi ay heshay oggolaanshaha madaxa dowladda ama dowladda inuu ku biiro OGP.

English: Governments should ensure that there are paths to becoming active in OGP through the global community, the government’s own OGP dialogue mechanism, or both.
Kiswahili: Serikali zinapaswa kuhakikisha kwamba kuna njia za kuwa na shughuli katika OGP kupitia jamii ya kimataifa, utaratibu wa mazungumzo wa serikali ya OGP, au zote mbili.
Dholuo: Sirkande onego one ni nitie yore mag bedo gi chuny mar tiyo gi OGP kokalo kuom oganda mar piny mangima, chenro mar sirkande mag OGP, kata giduto.
Somali: Dowladaha waa inay hubiyaan in ay jiraan wadooyin ay ku dhaqmaan OGP iyada oo loo marayo bulshada caalamiga ah, nidaamka wadahadalka OGP ee dowladda, ama labadaba.

English: They are the product of a co-creation process in which government and civil society define ambitious commitments to foster transparency, accountability and inclusion.
Kiswahili: Wao ni bidhaa ya mchakato wa uundaji-shirika ambapo serikali na jamii ya kiraia huamua ahadi za kutaka kuendeleza uwazi, uwajibikaji na ujumuishaji.
Dholuo: Gin gik ma ne ochakore e kinde ma sirkal kod oganda dhano ne ochano mondo okonygi e loso winjruok maber gi dhano.
Somali: Waxay yihiin natiijada nidaamka wada-abuurka ee ay dowladdu iyo bulshada rayidka ah ay ku qeexaan ballanqaadyo hami leh oo lagu dhiirrigeliyo caddeynta, xisaabinta iyo ka mid noqoshada.

English: Participating governments are encouraged to produce an End-of-term Self-Assessment Report on the final results of reforms completed in the action plan, consultation during implementation, and lessons learned.
Kiswahili: Serikali zinazohusika zinatiwa moyo kutoa ripoti ya kujitathmini ya mwisho ya mwisho juu ya matokeo ya mwisho ya mageuzi yaliyofanywa katika mpango wa hatua, ushauri wakati wa utekelezaji, na masomo yaliyochukuliwa.
Dholuo: Oganda ma biro bedo gi loch e pinyno biro yudo thuolo mar timo nonro e wi weche ma ne gipuonjore e wi chenro mar timo lokruok ma ne otim e pinyno.
Somali: Dowladaha ka qaybgalaya waxaa lagu dhiiri geliyaa inay soo saaraan Warbixin Is-qiimeyn ah oo ku saabsan natiijooyinka ugu dambeeya ee isbeddellada lagu dhammeystiray qorshaha ficilka, la tashiga fulinta iyo casharrada laga soo bartay.

English: More to promote more transparent, accountable, responsive and inclusive governance.
Kiswahili: Kuongeza katika kuendeleza utawala wa uwazi zaidi, wenye kutoa hesabu, wenye kufaa na wenye kuingiza watu wote.
Dholuo: Tiego weche mag loch e yo makare, kendo ma ok okelo bura, kendo ma okelo bura, biro konyo ahinya.
Somali: Intaa waxaa dheer, in la horumariyo maamul ka cadaalad badan, xisaabtan, jawaab celin iyo mid ka mid ah.

Kiswahili: Ni wazi zaidi kwamba ushirikiano, uwazi Kulingana na Vifungu vya Utawala wa OGP, uwazi hufanyika wakati habari inayomilikiwa na serikali (ikiwa ni pamoja na juu ya shughuli na maamuzi) ni wazi, kamili, kwa wakati, kwa uhuru inapatikana kwa umma ...
Dholuo: Bedo gi winjruok maber gi sirkal, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi rieko, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo, bedo gi ng'eyo,

English: Jurisdictions not in OGP Local can participate in their national OGP process, which is regulated by the OGP National Handbook or apply for OGP Local when OGP launches a call for applications.
Kiswahili: Mahakama ambazo sio katika OGP Local zinaweza kushiriki katika mchakato wao wa kitaifa wa OGP, ambao unadhibitiwa na Mwongozo wa Kitaifa wa OGP au kuomba OGP Local wakati OGP inazindua wito wa maombi.
Dholuo: Jurisdictions maok nie OGP Local nyalo riwo lwedo chenro margi mar OGP, ma en chenro mar OGP National Handbook, kata nyalo kwayo mondo OGP Local oyudgi sama OGP ogolo kwayo mar kwayo.
Somali: Xukuumadaha aan ka tirsanayn OGP Local waxay ka qayb qaadan karaan nidaamka OGP ee qaranka, kaas oo lagu xakameynayo Buugga Qaranka ee OGP ama waxay dalban karaan OGP Local marka OGP ay bilawdo codsiyada codsiyada.

English: In order to become a member, local jurisdictions must meet the eligibility criteria and submit a Letter of Support.
Kiswahili: Ili kuwa mwanachama, mamlaka za mitaa lazima zikidhi vigezo vya kufaa na kuwasilisha Barua ya Msaada.
Dholuo: Mondo gibed jokanyo, sirkal manie alwora ma gidakie nyaka chop e gik ma dwarore mondo gibed jokanyo kendo nyaka gimi barua mar kony.
Somali: Si ay xubno u noqdaan, maamul goboleedyada deegaanka waa inay buuxiyaan shuruudaha u qalma iyo inay soo gudbiyaan Warqad Taageero.

English: A minimum set of eligibility criteria is required to join OGP Local to ensure adequate conditions for developing and implementing an action plan Action plans are at the core of a government’s participation in OGP.
Kiswahili: Vipimo vya chini vya kuweza kujiunga na OGP ya Mitaa vinahitajika ili kuhakikisha hali sahihi za kutengeneza na kutekeleza mpango wa hatua Mipango ya hatua ni msingi wa ushiriki wa serikali katika OGP.
Dholuo: Mondo omi ng'ato odonj e OGP Local, dwarore ni obed gi gik ma dwarore ahinya mondo omi ochak loso kendo tiyo gi chenro mar tich.
Somali: Waxaa loo baahan yahay shuruudo ugu yar oo ku saabsan shuruudaha u qalma in lagu biiro OGP Local si loo hubiyo in shuruudaha ku habboon ee lagu soo saaro loona hirgeliyo qorshe ficil.

English: During open calls for new members, a local government that meets eligibility criteria and wants to join OGP must submit a Letter of Support (LOS).
Kiswahili: Wakati wa wito wazi wa wanachama wapya, serikali ya mitaa ambayo inakidhi vigezo vya uhalali na anataka kujiunga na OGP lazima kuwasilisha Barua ya Msaada (LOS).
Dholuo: Sama itimo kwayo mar kwayo joma biro bedo jokanyo manyien, sirkal mar alwora ma chopo gik ma dwarore mondo omiye thuolo mar bedo achiel kuom joma dwaro bedo jokanyo mag OGP nyaka chiw barua mar kony (LOS).
Somali: Marka la eego wicitaannada furan ee xubnaha cusub, dowladda hoose ee buuxisa shuruudaha u qalma oo doonaysa inay ku biirto OGP waa inay soo gudbiso Warqad Taageero (LOS).

English: This LOS should be three (3) pages maximum on the local government’s letterhead, in English, supporting the application of their jurisdiction and committing to meeting OGP values and the above criteria.
Kiswahili: Hii LOS lazima kuwa na ukurasa wa tatu (3) juu ya serikali ya mitaa barua kichwa, kwa Kiingereza, kuunga mkono utekelezaji wa mamlaka yao na kujitolea kwa kukidhi maadili OGP na vigezo hapo juu.
Dholuo: Lokruogno onego obed gi ite adek (3) e dho Kisungu, manyiso ni sirkal mar alwora nigi ratiro mar timo gik moko kendo ni gidwaro chopo gik ma OGP wacho kod gik ma ne oler malo kae.
Somali: Loss-ka waa inuu ahaadaa ugu badnaan saddex (3) bog oo ku qoran qoraalka dowladda hoose, oo ku qoran af Ingiriis, taageeraya codsiga xukunkooda iyo ballanqaadka lagu gaaro qiimaha OGP iyo shuruudaha kor ku xusan.

English: It must be signed by the head of the local government or a senior local official with delegated authority, and at least one (1) non-governmental stakeholder 1 willing to support and be part of the OGP Local process.
Kiswahili: Lazima iwe imesainiwa na mkuu wa serikali ya mitaa au afisa wa juu wa mitaa mwenye mamlaka ya kuteuliwa, na angalau mmoja (1) mshiriki wa maslahi wa serikali 1 ambaye anataka kusaidia na kuwa sehemu ya mchakato wa OGP Mitaa.
Dholuo: Nyaka oket sei kuom jatelo mar sirkal mar alwora kata jatelo moro maduong' mar sirkal ma nigi teko mar miyi teko, kod ng'at achiel (1) maok mar sirkal 1 madwaro riwo lwedo kendo bedo achiel kuom joma timo chenro mar OGP.
Somali: Waa in uu saxiixdaa madaxa dowladda hoose ama sarkaal sare oo maxalliga ah oo leh awood loo xilsaaray, iyo ugu yaraan hal (1) daneeyne oo aan dowlade ahayn 1 oo doonaya inuu taageero ka siiyo hanaanka OGP Local.

English: The Letter of Support must address: The Letters of Support will be assessed by the Support Unit based on the criteria outlined above.
Kiswahili: Barua ya Msaada lazima ieleze: Barua za Msaada zitathaminiwa na Kitengo cha Msaada kulingana na vigezo vilivyoelezwa hapo juu.
Dholuo: Barua mar kony nyaka wuo kuom wachni: Barua mar kony biro nono gi riwruok mar kony kaluwore gi weche ma osetiny e sula mokalo.
Somali: Warqadda taageerada waa in ay ka hadashaa: Warqadaha taageerada waxaa qiimeyn doona cutubka taageerada iyadoo lagu saleynayo shuruudaha kor lagu soo sheegay.

English: In addition, other factors will be considered to ensure a diverse cohort, such as regional balance, type of jurisdiction and population size, as well as different strengths to complement the overall objectives of OGP Local.
Kiswahili: Kwa kuongezea, mambo mengine yatazingatiwa ili kuhakikisha kundi tofauti, kama vile usawa wa kikanda, aina ya mamlaka na ukubwa wa idadi ya watu, pamoja na nguvu tofauti ili kuongeza malengo ya jumla ya OGP Local.
Dholuo: E wi mano, ibiro non gik mamoko ma biro miyo ji obed gi winjruok maber gi Nyasaye, kaka chal mar alwora, chal mar alwora ma gidakie, kod kwan mar ji, kaachiel gi gik ma nyalo konyo e chopo chenro duto mag OGP Local.
Somali: Intaa waxaa dheer, waxaa la tixgelin doonaa arrimo kale oo lagu xaqiijinayo isku-darka kala duwan, sida dheelitirka gobolka, nooca xukunka iyo tirada dadka, iyo sidoo kale xoogga kala duwan si loo dhammaystiro ujeedooyinka guud ee OGP Local.

English: Specific guidance and examples will be provided by the Support Unit at the start of a call for new members.
Kiswahili: Mwongozo maalum na mifano itatolewa na Kikundi cha Msaada mwanzoni mwa wito wa washiriki wapya.
Dholuo: E chakruok mar kwayo mondo ji obed e riwruok manyien, biro yudo paro kod ranyisi ma biro nyiso wachno.
Somali: Kooxda taageerada waxay bixin doontaa tilmaamo iyo tusaalooyin gaar ah bilowga wicitaan loogu talagalay xubnaha cusub.

English: Each action plan must be co-created by government and non-governmental stakeholders, implemented, monitored and assessed.
Kiswahili: Kila mpango wa hatua lazima uandaliwe pamoja na mashirika ya serikali na yasiyo ya serikali, kutekelezwa, kufuatiliwa na kutathminiwa.
Dholuo: Chenro moro amora mar timo gik moko nyaka bed ni sirkal kod jomamoko ma ok gin sirkal ema loso kode, kendo onego otimne, oluw, oluw kendo onon.
Somali: Qorshe kasta oo ficil waa in ay wada abuuraan dowladaha iyo daneeyayaasha aan dawladda ahayn, oo ay hirgeliyaan, kormeeraan oo qiimeeyaan.

English: OGP refers to the person responsible for coordinating the government’s participation in OGP Local as a Local Government Point of Contact (POC) .
Kiswahili: OGP inahusu mtu anayehusika katika kuhariri ushiriki wa serikali katika OGP ya Mitaa kama Kituo cha Mawasiliano cha Serikali ya Mitaa (POC).
Dholuo: OGP en ng'at ma tayo chenro mar sirkal mar konyo sirkal e OGP Local kaka kar tudruok mar sirkal.
Somali: OGP waxaa loola jeedaa qofka mas'uulka ka ah isku-darka ka qaybgalka dowladda ee OGP Local sida barta xiriirka dowladda hoose (POC).

English: The role is crucial and multidimensional; points of contact are at the forefront of transparency, participation, and accountability efforts for an OGP participating government.
Kiswahili: Jukumu ni muhimu na mbalimbali; maeneo ya mawasiliano ni katika hatua ya mbele ya uwazi, ushiriki, na juhudi za uwajibikaji kwa serikali kushiriki katika OGP.
Dholuo: Migawo mar jogo en gima duong' kendo ma nigi yore mang'eny; kuonde ma ji tudoree ema nigi teko mar nyiso ni gimiyo sirkal moro amora ma biro bedo e bwo loch mar OGP thuolo mar timo gik moko e yo makare, kendo mondo gibed gi thuolo mar timo kamano.
Somali: Doorka ayaa ah mid muhiim ah oo dhinacyo badan leh; dhibcaha xiriirka ayaa hormuudka ka ah dadaallada hufnaan, ka qaybgalka, iyo xisaabinta dowladda ka qaybqaata OGP.

English: The OGP Local Point of Contact responsibilities and activities include: The participation of both government and non-governmental stakeholders is essential to the success of the OGP.
Kiswahili: Masuala na shughuli za Kituo cha Mawasiliano cha Mitaa cha OGP ni pamoja na: Ushirikiano wa pande zote za serikali na zisizo za serikali ni muhimu kwa mafanikio ya OGP.
Dholuo: Gik ma OGP Local Point of Contact timo kod gik ma gitimo gin: Riwruok mar sirkal kod jomamoko ma ok gin sirkal e ma biro konyo ahinya e miyo OGP odhi maber.
Somali: Masuuliyadaha iyo hawlaha barta xiriirka ee OGP ee deegaanka waxaa ka mid ah: Ka qaybgalka labada dhinac ee dowladda iyo kuwa aan dowladda ahayn ayaa muhiim u ah guusha OGP.

English: They contribute with the technical expertise, human resources, and convening capacity to effectively ensure the OGP principle of co-creation and participation is fulfilled.
Kiswahili: Wao hutoa mchango kwa ujuzi wa kiufundi, rasilimali za binadamu, na uwezo wa kuunganisha ili kuhakikisha kwa ufanisi kanuni ya OGP ya uundaji pamoja na ushiriki ni kutimizwa.
Dholuo: Gimiyo joma kamago thuolo mar chiwo kony e yore mopogore opogore, kendo mano miyo gibedo gi thuolo mar timo gik ma dwarore.
Somali: Waxay gacan ka geystaan aqoonta farsamada, kheyraadka bini'aadamka iyo awoodda u qabashada inay si wax ku ool ah u hubiyaan in la buuxiyo mabda'a OGP ee wada abuurista iyo ka qaybgalka.

English: For this reason, it must be a trusted and independent actor.
Kiswahili: Kwa sababu hiyo, lazima awe mchezaji anayeaminika na huru.
Dholuo: Kuom mano, nyaka bed ni en jatelo ma inyalo gen kendo ma onge ratiro.
Somali: Sababtan awgeed, waa in ay ahaataa mid lagu kalsoonaan karo oo madax banaan.

English: Local monitoring bodies must, at a minimum, use the forms provided by OGP Local to conduct their reporting and are highly encouraged to use the guidance materials provided by OGP Local and the IRM to conduct their work.
Kiswahili: Wako katika maeneo ya ufuatiliaji lazima, angalau, kutumia fomu zilizotolewa na OGP Local kufanya ripoti zao na wanatiwa moyo sana kutumia vifaa vya mwongozo vilivyoandaliwa na OGP Local na IRM kufanya kazi zao.
Dholuo: Oganda ma nono weche manie alwora nyaka ti gi fom ma OGP Local chiwo mondo gitimgo ripotgi kendo ijiwogi ahinya ni giti gi weche ma OGP Local kod IRM chiwo mondo gitim tijgi.
Somali: Hay'adaha kormeerka deegaanka waa inay ugu yaraan isticmaalaan foomamka ay bixiso OGP Local si ay u sameeyaan warbixintooda waxaana si weyn loogu dhiiri gelinayaa inay u isticmaalaan agabyada hagida ee ay bixiyaan OGP Local iyo IRM si ay u sameeyaan shaqadooda.

English: The Support Unit aims to ensure that high-quality direction and information is available to OGP stakeholders, whether directly, through institutional partners, or through peer-to-peer engagement.
Kiswahili: Kitengo cha Msaada kinalenga kuhakikisha kwamba viongozi na habari za ubora wa juu zinapatikana kwa mashirika ya OGP, iwe moja kwa moja, kupitia washirika wa taasisi, au kupitia ushirikiano wa peer-to-peer.
Dholuo: Yore ma riwruok mar kony tiyogo konyo e miyo joma nie riwruok mar oganda Jehova obed gi paro mowinjore kendo gibed gi weche ma ginyalo konyogi, bed ni gitiyo gi riwruok mar oganda Jehova achiel kachiel, kokalo kuom riwruok mar riwruok mar oganda Jehova, kata kokalo kuom riwruok mar oganda Jehova.
Somali: Qeybta taageerada waxay ujeedkeedu yahay in la hubiyo in tilmaamaha iyo macluumaadka tayada sare leh ay heli karaan daneeyayaasha OGP, ha ahaato si toos ah, iyada oo loo marayo wada-hawlgalayaasha hay'adaha, ama iyada oo loo marayo wada-shaqaynta dadka kale.

English: The OGP Local Team will be the main point of contact for the OGP Support Unit for all OGP Local members.
Kiswahili: Timu ya Mitaa ya OGP itakuwa kituo kikuu cha kuwasiliana cha Kitengo cha Msaada cha OGP kwa washiriki wote wa Mitaa ya OGP.
Dholuo: OGP Local Team biro bedo kama duong' ma OGP Local members duto biro tudoree gi OGP Support Unit.
Somali: Kooxda Hoose ee OGP waxay noqon doontaa barta ugu weyn ee xiriirka ee cutubka taageerada OGP ee dhammaan xubnaha Hoose ee OGP.

English: The action plan cycle must align with the term limits of the local government in office.
Kiswahili: Mzunguko wa mpango wa hatua lazima uambatanishwe na mipaka ya muda wa serikali ya mitaa katika ofisi.
Dholuo: Chenro mar timo chenro mar timo lokruok nyaka winjre gi chenro mar sirkal mar alwora ma sani locho.
Somali: Wareegga qorshaha ficilku waa inuu la jaan qaadaa xadka muddada maamulka hoose ee xilka haysta.

English: During this period, members should identify how they will use the OGP action plan process to deliver on their strategic, longer-term open government goals and identify the key stakeholders to engage before commencing public consultation activities.
Kiswahili: Wakati huu, wanachama wanapaswa kutambua jinsi watatumia mchakato wa mpango wa hatua wa OGP kufikia malengo yao ya kimkakati ya serikali wazi ya muda mrefu na kutambua washirika muhimu wa kushiriki kabla ya kuanza shughuli za ushauri wa umma.
Dholuo: E kindeno, jokanyo onego ong'e kaka gibiro tiyo gi chenro mar OGP mondo gimi gigol chenro mag sirkal ma margi giwegi kendo ma nigi thuolo mar chopo gigo ma gidwaro kendo ging'e joma onego omany kony kapok gichako timo chenro mar wuoyo gi ji.
Somali: Xubnaha waa inay inta lagu jiro muddadan ogaadaan sida ay u isticmaali doonaan habka qorshaha tallaabooyinka OGP si ay u gaaraan ujeedooyinkooda istiraatiijiyadeed ee muddada dheer ee dowladda furan, waxayna u aqoonsadaan daneeyayaasha muhiimka ah ee ay ku lug yeelan doonaan ka hor inta aan la bilaabin howlaha wadatashiga dadweynaha.

English: The online orientation program must be completed by new OGP Local members as they begin the action plan co-creation process.
Kiswahili: Programu ya mwelekeo wa mtandaoni lazima ikamilishwe na washiriki wapya wa OGP Mitaa wanapoanza mchakato wa uundaji wa pamoja wa mpango wa hatua.
Dholuo: Jogo manyien ma gin jokanyo mag OGP Local nyaka chop e chenro mar tiego ji e Intanet ka gichako loso chenro mar tich kanyachiel.
Somali: Barnaamijka bartilmaameedka internetka waa in xubnaha cusub ee OGP Local ay dhamaystiraan marka ay bilaabaan habka wada-abuurka qorshaha ficilka.

English: During this period the member must co-create the new Local Open Government Strategic Vision and initial commitments.
Kiswahili: Wakati huu mwanachama lazima kuunda pamoja mpya Maoni ya kimkakati ya Serikali ya Mitaa wazi na ahadi za awali.
Dholuo: E kindeno, jakanyo nyaka bed achiel kuom joma loso chenro manyien mar chenro mar sirkal manyien kendo timo chenro mokwongo.
Somali: Muddo intaas ah xubinku waa inuu wada abuuraa aragtida istiraatiijiyadeed ee cusub ee dowladda hoose ee furan iyo ballanqaadyada bilowga ah.

English: It should be based on policy principles, seek to achieve long-term outcomes and identify medium-term outputs.
Kiswahili: Lazima itegemee kanuni za sera, itafute kufikia matokeo ya muda mrefu na kutambua matokeo ya muda wa kati.
Dholuo: Owinjore oger chenro mar timo dongruok e yore mag siasa, kendo omany chenro mag timo dongruok e yore mag ngima kuom kinde malach.
Somali: Waa in ay ku saleysan tahay mabaadi'da siyaasadda, waxay u baahan tahay in la gaaro natiijooyin muddada dheer ah iyo in la aqoonsado natiijooyinka muddada dhexe.

English: The Local Open Government Strategic Vision requires an inclusive process to ensure the “buy-in” from key actors both within and outside government.
Kiswahili: Maoni ya kimkakati ya Serikali ya Mitaa ya Open yanahitaji mchakato wa pamoja ili kuhakikisha ununuzi kutoka kwa watendaji muhimu ndani na nje ya serikali.
Dholuo: Chenro mar Local Open Government Strategic Vision dwaro ni chenro mar locho obed moting'o ji duto mondo omi jotelo madongo mag sirkal koda mag sirkal oyud thuolo mar donjo e sirkal.
Somali: Aragtida istiraatiijiyadeed ee Dawladda Hoose ee Furan waxay u baahan tahay geedi socodka ka kooban si loo hubiyo in ay ka iibsadaan dhinacyada muhiimka ah ee ka shaqeeya dowladda gudaheeda iyo dibaddeedaba.

English: Lastly, it must also include overall information on the activities that will be carried out during this period to monitor and publicize progress, including the designated Monitoring Body.
Kiswahili: Mwishowe, lazima pia iwe na habari ya jumla juu ya shughuli ambazo zitafanywa wakati huu kufuatilia na kutangaza maendeleo, ikiwa ni pamoja na Mamlaka ya Kufuatilia iliyochaguliwa.
Dholuo: Gikone, onego oriw weche duto ma nyiso tije ma biro timore e kindeno mondo omi ji ong'e dongruok mosetim, moriwo nyaka riwruok mar rito weche.
Somali: Ugu dambeyntii, waa in ay sidoo kale ku dartaa macluumaad guud oo ku saabsan howlaha lagu sameyn doono muddadaas si loo kormeero loona shaacinayo horumarka, oo ay ku jiraan Hay'adda la magacaabay ee kormeerka.

English: In either case, OGP Local members should demonstrate clear improvement from the current state of practice.
Kiswahili: Katika hali zote mbili, washiriki wa OGP Local wanapaswa kuonyesha uboreshaji dhahiri kutoka kwa hali ya sasa ya mazoezi.
Dholuo: E chal moro amora, joma nie OGP Local onego onyis ni gikonyo e yo maber moloyo.
Somali: Xaaladaha labadaba, xubnaha OGP Local waa inay muujiyaan horumar cad oo ka soo baxaya xaaladda dhaqanka ee hadda jirta.

English: Each commitment must clearly identify the problem that it seeks to address, expected result of the commitment, milestones and implementation dates, available resources and the responsible organizations for the implementation of the commitment.
Kiswahili: Kila ahadi lazima ieleze wazi tatizo ambalo inataka kushughulikia, matokeo yanayotarajiwa ya ahadi, hatua muhimu na tarehe za utekelezaji, rasilimali zinazopatikana na mashirika ya kuwajibika kwa utekelezaji wa ahadi.
Dholuo: Kata kamano, ka ng'ato ka ng'ato kuomwa oketo chenro mar timo kamano, onego onyis maler pek ma odwaro romogo, kaka obiro yudo nyak ma odwaro, kaka obiro chopo gigo, kaka obiro chopo gigo, kaka obiro chopo gigo, koda kaka obiro chopo gigo, kaachiel gi gik ma biro timore e kinde mabiro.
Somali: Ballanqaad kasta waa inuu si cad u qeexaa dhibaatada uu doonayo inuu wax ka qabto, natiijada la filayo ee ballanqaadka, taariikhda iyo taariikhda hirgelinta, kheyraadka la heli karo iyo ururada masuulka ka ah hirgelinta ballanqaadka.

English: The plan must contain specific, time-bound, and measurable commitments that are: Commitments should have a minimum duration of one calendar year, but they can also span the entire action plan period.
Kiswahili: Mpango huo lazima uwe na ahadi maalum, zilizowekwa kwa muda, na zinazoweza kupimwa ambazo ni: Wajibu huo unapaswa kuwa na muda wa chini wa mwaka mmoja wa kalenda, lakini pia unaweza kuzingatia kipindi chote cha mpango wa hatua.
Dholuo: Chenro mar timo nonro nyaka bed gi gik ma dwarore ahinya, ma ok nyal pimre, kendo ma nigi ratiro mar timo kamano: Chenro mar timo nonro onego obed gi higni ma dirom higa achiel, to bende ginyalo chopo e kinde duto mar chenrono.
Somali: Qorshaha waa inuu ka kooban yahay ballanqaadyo gaar ah, waqti ku xiran, iyo kuwo la qiyaasi karo oo ah: Ballanqaadyadu waa inay leeyihiin muddo ugu yar hal sano kalandari ah, laakiin sidoo kale waxay ku baahnaan karaan muddada qorshaha ficilka oo dhan.

English: Once a commitment is completely implemented it must be assessed by the Monitoring Body, and a new commitment can be co-created and included in the action plan as long as it can be fully implemented during the action plan period.
Kiswahili: Mara tu ahadi imewekwa kikamilifu, lazima itathminiwe na Mamlaka ya Ufuatiliaji, na ahadi mpya inaweza kuundwa pamoja na kuingizwa katika mpango wa hatua kwa muda mrefu kama inaweza kutekelezwa kikamilifu wakati wa kipindi cha mpango wa hatua.
Dholuo: Bang' ka osetim singruok moro chuth, onego omi migawo mar nono wachno, kendo singruok manyien nyalo chue kendo iket e chenro mar tich, ka pod inyalo tim singruokno chuth e kinde ma chenro mar tich itimo.
Somali: Marka ballanqaadka si buuxda loo hirgeliyo waa in ay qiimeeyaan Hay'adda kormeerka, ballanqaad cusubna waa la wada abuuri karaa oo lagu dari karaa qorshaha ficilka illaa inta si buuxda loo hirgeliyo muddada qorshaha ficilka.

English: Any changes to a commitment must be consulted and approved with the non-governmental stakeholders involved in the co-creation process.
Kiswahili: Mabadiliko yoyote katika ahadi lazima yaulizwe na kupitishwa na mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali ya maslahi yanayohusika katika mchakato wa uundaji-shirika.
Dholuo: Lokruoge duto ma timore e chenro mar timo chenro mar timo gik moko nyaka timre kendo nyaka giyud yie gi joma ok gin jokanyo mag sirkal ma gin joma nie bwo loch mar riwruok mar oganda Jehova.
Somali: Wax ka bedelka ballanqaadka waa in lagala tashigayaa oo la ansixiyaa dhinacyada daneeyayaasha ah ee aan dawliga ahayn ee ku lug leh habka wada abuurista.

English: Any changes, including the process for arriving at the decision, must be documented.
Kiswahili: Mabadiliko yoyote, ikiwa ni pamoja na mchakato wa kufikia uamuzi, lazima uandikishwe.
Dholuo: Lokruoge duto moriwo nyaka chenro mar ng'ado paro nyaka bed ni ondik e yo matut.
Somali: Isbeddellada, oo ay ku jiraan habka lagu gaaro go'aanka, waa in la diiwaangeliyaa.

English: In the case an OGP Local member wants to make a change to an existing commitment, this must be communicated to the OGP Local Team.
Kiswahili: Katika kesi ya mwanachama wa OGP Mitaa anataka kufanya mabadiliko kwa ahadi zilizopo, hii lazima itangazwe kwa Timu ya Mitaa ya OGP.
Dholuo: Kapo ni achiel kuom jo OGP Local dwaro loko chenro moro ma ne gin-go, onego owach wachno ne OGP Local Team.
Somali: Haddii xubin ka tirsan OGP Local uu doonayo inuu wax ka beddelo ballanqaadka jira, waa in la ogeysiiyaa Kooxda Hoose ee OGP.

English: Both the Local Open Government Strategic Vision and each individual commitment must be co-created with the active engagement of citizens and civil society.
Kiswahili: Maoni ya kimkakati ya Serikali ya Mitaa ya Open na kila ahadi ya kibinafsi lazima iandaliwe pamoja na ushiriki wa kiraia na jamii ya kiraia.
Dholuo: Kata kamano, nitie gik mang'eny ma nyalo konyo e loso chenro mar sirkal ma ok ochuno.
Somali: Aragtida istiraatiijiyadeed ee dowladda furan ee maxalliga ah iyo ballanqaad kasta oo shaqsi ah waa in la abuuraa iyadoo la kaashanayo ka qaybgalka firfircoon ee muwaadiniinta iyo bulshada rayidka ah.

English: In order to promote a high level of public influence during development and implementation of the action plan, governments must have a space or structure for iterative dialogue and co-creation.
Kiswahili: Ili kukuza kiwango cha juu cha ushawishi wa umma wakati wa kubuni na kutekeleza mpango wa hatua, serikali lazima ziwe na nafasi au muundo wa mazungumzo ya kurudia na uundaji wa pamoja.
Dholuo: Mondo sirkande mag dhano obed gi teko mar chiko pachgi e kinde ma giloso kendo gitimo chenro mar timo gik moko, nyaka gibed gi chenro kata chenro mar wuoyo kendo chano gik moko kanyachiel.
Somali: Si loo dhiirrigeliyo heer sare oo saameyn dadweynaha ah marka la horumarinayo qorshaha ficilka iyo hirgelinta, dawladuhu waa inay lahaadaan meel ama qaab wada hadal iyo wada abuur.

English: In order to ensure that the required level of participation is achieved, the following minimum requirements All OGP participating countries are expected to adhere to the Participation and Co-Creation Standards.
Kiswahili: Ili kuhakikisha kwamba kiwango cha ushiriki kinachohitajika kinapatikana, mahitaji ya chini yafuatayo Inatarajiwa nchi zote zinazohusika katika OGP kuzingatia Viwango vya Ushiriki na Uundaji Pamoja.
Dholuo: Mondo omi omi omi kwan mar joma ochiwore ochiwre, dwarore ni pinje duto ma ochiwore mar timo tijni oluw chike ma luwogi.
Somali: Si loo hubiyo in la gaaro heerka ka qaybgalka la doonayo, shuruudaha ugu yar ee soo socda Waxaa la filayaa in dhammaan waddamada ka qaybgalaya OGP ay u hoggaansamaan Heerarka ka qaybgalka iyo wada abuurista.

English: Throughout its ten years of experience, OGP has identified the following best practices to ensure adequate engagement of civil society, citizens and other stakeholders throughout the OGP process.
Kiswahili: Katika miaka yake kumi ya uzoefu, OGP imebainisha mazoea yafuatayo bora ili kuhakikisha ushiriki wa kutosha wa jamii ya kiraia, wananchi na washirika wengine katika mchakato wa OGP.
Dholuo: Kuom higini apar ma osetiyogo, OGP osefwenyo yore mabeyo maluwogi mag konyo oganda dhano, raia koda joma ok gin jokanyo e yo makare e kinde duto mag OGP.
Somali: Muddo toban sano ah oo waayo-aragnimadeeda ah, OGP waxay aqoonsatay hababka ugu wanaagsan ee soo socda si loo hubiyo ka qaybgalka ku filan ee bulshada rayidka ah, muwaadiniinta iyo daneeyayaasha kale inta lagu jiro geedi socodka OGP.

English: Accordingly, it is recommended that the government, with support from the non-governmental stakeholders, adopt the following practices throughout the action plan cycle: These practices reflect the often difficult realities of making open government reforms work.
Kiswahili: Kwa hiyo, inashauriwa serikali, kwa msaada wa washirika wasio wa serikali, kupitisha mazoea yafuatayo katika mzunguko wa mpango wa hatua: mazoea haya yanaonyesha hali ngumu za kufanya mageuzi ya serikali wazi ifanye kazi.
Dholuo: Omiyo, ojiw ni sirkal, gi kony ma wuok kuom joma ok gin sirkal, oluw timbe maluwogi e kinde duto mag chenro mar timo gik moko: Timbe ma kamago nyiso gik ma timore e kinde ma thothne tek ahinya mondo olos sirkal obed moikore.
Somali: Sidaa darteed, waxaa lagugula talinayaa in dowladda, iyadoo la taageerayo daneeyayaasha aan dowladda ahayn, ay qaataan dhaqanka soo socda inta lagu jiro wareegga qorshaha ficilka: Tilmaamahan waxay ka tarjumayaan xaqiiqda inta badan adag ee ka jirta in dib u habeynta dawladda furan ay shaqeyso.

English: For example jurisdictions may want to form a coalition to: Coalitions must follow these additional guidelines: The governance of the coalition must be defined by the coalition partners themselves.
Kiswahili: Kwa mfano, mamlaka zinaweza kutaka kuunda muungano ili: Ushirikiano lazima kufuata miongozo hii ya ziada: Utawala wa muungano lazima kuamuliwa na washirika wa muungano wenyewe.
Dholuo: Kuom ranyisi, sirkande mag loje nyalo dwaro loso riwruok mar riwruok mondo: riwruoge mag loje nyaka luw puonj mamoko: Jokanyo mag riwruok mar loje nyaka ket chenro mar loch mar riwruok mar loje.
Somali: Tusaale ahaan, maamul goboleedyadu waxay u baahan karaan inay sameeyaan isbahaysi si ay u: Isbahaysiyada waa inay raacaan tilmaamahan dheeriga ah: Maamulka isbahaysiga waa in ay qeexaan wada-hawlgalayaasha isbahaysiga.

English: The mechanism must be endorsed by the local non-governmental stakeholders taking part in the OGP process.
Kiswahili: Mkakati huo lazima uidhinishwe na mashirika ya ndani yasiyo ya kiserikali yanayoshiriki katika mchakato wa OGP.
Dholuo: Chenrono nyaka bed ni joma nie alwora maok gin jokanyo mag sirkal ma donjo e chenro mar OGP oyie kode.
Somali: Nidaamka waa in ay ansixiyaan daneeyayaasha maxalliga ah ee aan dawliga ahayn ee ka qaybgalaya habka OGP.

English: To minimize the burden on OGP Local members, the selected monitoring body must file reports electronically on an online platform provided by OGP Local.
Kiswahili: Ili kupunguza mzigo kwa wanachama wa OGP Local, mwili wa ufuatiliaji uliochaguliwa lazima uwasilishe ripoti kwa njia ya elektroniki kwenye jukwaa la mtandaoni ambalo linatolewa na OGP Local.
Dholuo: Mondo omi joma nie OGP Local kik bed gi pek mang'eny, riwruok mar rito weche onego ochiw ripode e yor kompyuta e yo machuok e yo machuok e yor intanet ma OGP Local chiwo.
Somali: Si loo yareeyo culeyska xubnaha OGP Local, hay'adda kormeerka la doortay waa inay warbixino ku soo gudbiso qaab elektaroonig ah oo ku saabsan barxadda internetka ee ay bixiso OGP Local.

English: Following IRM practice, the monitoring body must invite both government and non-government actors to provide comments during the monitoring process in order to ensure that views and contributions from stakeholders are considered.
Kiswahili: Kufuatia mazoezi ya IRM, mwili wa ufuatiliaji lazima uitie watendaji wa serikali na wasio wa serikali kutoa maoni wakati wa mchakato wa ufuatiliaji ili kuhakikisha kuwa maoni na michango kutoka kwa wanaohusika inachukuliwa.
Dholuo: Kaluwore gi yor IRM, riwruok mar nono nyaka gwel jotelo mag sirkal kod maok mag sirkal mondo ochiw paro e kinde mar nono mondo omi oket pachgi kuom paro kod chiwo mag joma nie bwo loch.
Somali: Iyadoo la raacayo dhaqanka IRM, hay'adda kormeerka waa inay ku casuumaysaa labadaba daneeyayaasha dowladda iyo kuwa aan dawladda ahayn inay ka faalloodaan inta lagu jiro habka kormeerka si loo hubiyo in la tixgeliyo aragtida iyo ka qaybgalka daneeyayaasha.

English: The burden of proof falls on the OGP Local member to provide evidence for any claims of activities carried out. ( See Annex 5 for greater detail of what constitutes evidence for OGP purposes.) The OGP Local member will ensure resources are available to the monitoring body to carry out its mandate.
Kiswahili: Mzigo wa ushahidi unakuwa juu ya OGP Mitaa mshiriki kutoa ushahidi kwa madai yoyote ya shughuli uliofanywa. (Ona Annex 5 kwa maelezo zaidi ya nini ni ushahidi kwa madhumuni ya OGP.)
Dholuo: Migawo mar nyiso ni ng'ato nigi ratiro mar chiwo gik manyiso ni gik ma ne otimgo ne gin adier. (Ne ane weche momedore e Sula mar 5 e wi gima nyiso ni ng'ato nigi ratiro mar timo kamano.)
Somali: Xubinta OGP Local waxay ku lug leedahay in ay caddayn ku bixiso sheegashada kasta ee ku saabsan howlaha la fuliyay (Fiiri liiska 5 si faahfaahsan oo ku saabsan waxa caddayn loogu talagalay ujeeddooyinka OGP). Xubin ka tirsan OGP Local wuxuu hubiyaa in hay'adda kormeerka ay haysato kheyraad ay ku fuliso xilkeeda.

English: This assessment must be finalized within two months of the submission of the action plan.
Kiswahili: Tathmini hii lazima ifanyike ndani ya miezi miwili baada ya kuwasilisha mpango wa hatua.
Dholuo: Nonro ma kamano nyaka timre bang' dweche ariyo bang' ka osechiw chenro mar timo lokruok.
Somali: Qiimayntaas waa in la dhammeystiraa laba bilood gudahood ka dib markii la soo gudbiyay qorshaha ficilka.

English: This short evaluation of the outcomes of the commitment must be submitted on an online platform.
Kiswahili: Tathmini hii fupi ya matokeo ya ahadi lazima kuwasilishwa kwenye jukwaa la mtandaoni.
Dholuo: Nonro machuok mar gik ma osetimore nikech singono nyaka bed e yo machuok e yor intanet.
Somali: Qiimaynta gaaban ee natiijooyinka ballanqaadka waa in lagu soo gudbiyaa barxad internetka.

English: The End-of-Commitment Assessment must be submitted one (1) month after the implementation of a commitment.
Kiswahili: Tathmini ya mwisho ya ahadi lazima iwasilishwe mwezi mmoja (1) baada ya utekelezaji wa ahadi.
Dholuo: Ka ng'ato dwaro ni mondo otim kamano, nyaka oket chik ma ne omiye.
Somali: Qiimaynta dhamaadka ballanqaadka waa in la soo gudbiyaa hal (1) bil ka dib fulinta ballanqaadka.

English: The report will analyze the information within the Inception and End-of-Commitment Assessments.
Kiswahili: Ripoti hiyo itachambua taarifa katika Tathmini za Mwanzo na Mwisho wa Ushirikiano.
Dholuo: Ripotno biro nono weche manie kind paro ma ne otim e wi kaka ne ochak tich kod kaka ne ochopo e giko tijno.
Somali: Warbixinta ayaa falanqeyneysa macluumaadka ku jira Qiimaynta Bilowga iyo Dhammaadka Ballanqaadka.

English: The Final Learning Exercise must capture the successes and areas of improvement of the action plan as a whole – from co-creation to final implementation.
Kiswahili: Mazoezi ya Mwisho ya Kujifunza lazima yazingatie mafanikio na maeneo ya kuboresha ya mpango wa hatua kwa ujumla  kutoka kwa uundaji wa pamoja hadi utekelezaji wa mwisho.
Dholuo: Chenro mar puonjruok mogik nyaka ket e paro gik ma ne otimore e ngima koda kuonde ma ne inyalo timie dongruok e chenro mar tich duto  chakre chweyo gik moko kanyachiel nyaka chop e chopo gigo.
Somali: Waxbarashada ugu dambeysa waa in ay soo bandhigtaa guulaha iyo meelaha lagu hagaajin karo qorshaha ficilka oo dhan  laga bilaabo wada abuurista ilaa fulinta ugu dambeysa.

English: The Final Learning Exercise and a report summarizing the lessons from the exercise and steps forward must be carried out and submitted online two (2) months after the end of the action plan.
Kiswahili: Mazoezi ya Mwisho ya Kujifunza na ripoti inayo muhtasari masomo kutoka kwa mazoezi na hatua zinazoendelea lazima zifanyike na kuwasilishwa mtandaoni miezi miwili (2) baada ya mwisho wa mpango wa hatua.
Dholuo: Weche ma ne opuonjore e wi tijno kod ripot ma ne oting'o weche ma ne opuonjore e wi tijno kod gik ma ne otimorego, nyaka timre kendo ochiwgi e Intanet bang' dweche ariyo (2) ka chenro mar tich osechopo.
Somali: Waxbarashada ugu dambeysa iyo warbixin soo koobaya casharrada ka soo baxday iyo tallaabooyinka ka soo baxay waa in la sameeyaa oo la soo gudbiyaa internetka laba (2) bilood ka dib dhamaadka qorshaha ficilka.

English: It is highly recommended that the local government discusses with the non-governmental stakeholders and with an OGP Local Team representative in cases of voluntary inactivity.

English: OGP Local members in probation can continue with their activities; however, they must rectify any unmet requirement within four months of conference of probation status.

Dholuo: Weuru mondo oket e paro bajet, jotich, thuolo, koda chiwo mag riwruoge mag sirkal kod riwruoge mamoko, kaachiel gi mwandu mamoko madwarore.
