English: Additional Information [Optional] Use this optional space to provide other useful information, for example: Please add below the individual milestones of your commitment.
Kiswahili: Habari ya ziada [Iwezekane] Tumia nafasi hii ya kuchagua kutoa habari nyingine muhimu, kwa mfano: Tafadhali ongeza hapa chini hatua za kibinafsi za ahadi yako.
Dholuo: Weche momedore [Onge Yo Monego Itimgo] Ti gi kama inyalo yiero mondo ikony ji gi weche mamoko makonyogi, kuom ranyisi: Ndikuru weche machuok e bwo sulani.
Somali: Macluumaad dheeri ah [Fursad] Isticmaal booskan ikhtiyaarka ah si aad u bixiso macluumaad kale oo faa'iido leh, tusaale ahaan: Fadlan hoos ku dar talaabooyinka gaarka ah ee ballanqaadkaaga.

English: For OGP Local members, a MSF is not a requirement; however, it is recommended if there are no other multi-stakeholder participatory spaces available to carry out the OGP Local process.
Kiswahili: Kwa wanachama wa OGP Local, MSF sio mahitaji; hata hivyo, inapendekezwa ikiwa hakuna nafasi zingine za ushirikiano wa mashirika mengi zinazopatikana ili kufanya mchakato wa OGP Local.
Dholuo: Kuom jogo manie OGP Local, onge gima dwarore ni otim ne joma ok gin jokanyo mag OGP; kata kamano, ok ber ka onge kuonde mamoko ma joma ok gin jokanyo mag OGP Local nyalo dhiye.
Somali: Xubnaha OGP Local, MSF ma aha shuruud; si kastaba ha ahaatee, waxaa lagugula talinayaa haddii aysan jirin meelo kale oo ka qaybqaata badan oo daneeyayaasha ah oo la heli karo si loo fuliyo geedi socodka OGP Local.

English: While the structure of every MSF will vary to reflect local contexts and demands, all MSFs are responsible for assisting in the development and oversight of the OGP process to ensure that it is open and inclusive of all stakeholders.
Kiswahili: Ingawa muundo wa kila MSF utatofautiana ili kutafakari mazingira na mahitaji ya ndani, MSF zote zina jukumu la kusaidia katika maendeleo na usimamizi wa mchakato wa OGP ili kuhakikisha kuwa ni wazi na unajumuisha pande zote zinazohusika.
Dholuo: Kata obedo ni chenro mar riwruok moro amora mar OMS biro pogore kaluwore gi chal mar alwora kod dwaro mag ji, OMS duto nigi ting' mar konyo e loso kendo rito chenro mar OGP mondo omi obed mayot kendo moriwo ji duto.
Somali: Inkastoo qaab dhismeedka MSF kasta uu kala duwanaan doono si uu u muujiyo xaaladaha iyo dalabaadka maxalliga ah, dhammaan MSF-yada ayaa mas'uul ka ah ka caawinta horumarinta iyo kormeerka geedi socodka OGP si loo hubiyo in ay u furan tahay oo ay ku jirto dhammaan daneeyayaasha.

English: OGP Local members must be able to determine whether they will establish a specific MSF for OGP or whether they will use existing spaces for multi-stakeholder dialogue in their contexts.
Kiswahili: OGP Wanachama wa Mitaa lazima waweze kuamua ikiwa wataanzisha MSF maalum kwa OGP au ikiwa watatumia nafasi zilizopo kwa mazungumzo ya pande nyingi katika mazingira yao.
Dholuo: OGP Jood Bura mag alwora nyaka bed gi nyalo mar yiero kabe gibiro loso chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro
Somali: OGP xubnaha deegaanka waa inay awoodaan inay go'aamiyaan in ay dhisayaan MSF gaar ah oo loogu talagalay OGP ama in ay isticmaalaan meelaha jira ee wadahadalka dhinacyada daneeyayaasha badan ee ku jira xaaladooda.

English: Regardless of the space chosen, OGP Local members will need to inform the OGP Support Unit of the details.OGP Local members are encouraged to ensure that these spaces are diverse and inclusive.
Kiswahili: Bila kujali nafasi iliyochaguliwa, washiriki wa OGP Local watahitaji kuwajulisha kitengo cha msaada wa OGP habari.Wanachama wa OGP Local wanahimizwa kuhakikisha kuwa nafasi hizi ni tofauti na zinajumuisha.
Dholuo: Kata bed ni oyiero kar dak mane, jo OGP Local biro dwarore ni onyisi OGP Support Unit weche duto.
Somali: Iyadoo aan loo eegin booska la doortay, xubnaha OGP Local waxay u baahan doonaan inay macluumaadka u sheegaan cutubka taageerada OGP.

English: The Local OGP website or webpage is recommended for OGP Local members to proactively disseminate information on all aspects of the OGP process and as a repository of information.
Kiswahili: Tovuti ya OGP ya Mitaa au ukurasa wa wavuti unapendekezwa kwa wanachama wa OGP ya Mitaa kueneza habari kwa bidii juu ya nyanja zote za mchakato wa OGP na kama hifadhi ya habari.
Dholuo: Websait mar OGP mar Piny kata webpage mar OGP mar Piny, en kama ji nyalo ketoe pachgi e lando weche e wi weche duto motudore gi chenro mar OGP kendo kaka kar kano weche.
Somali: Bogga internetka ee OGP Local ama bogga internetka waxaa lagu talinayaa xubnaha OGP Local inay si proactive ah u faafiyaan macluumaadka ku saabsan dhamaan dhinacyada geedi socodka OGP iyo inay u noqdaan keyd macluumaad.

English: The website or webpage should be visible, accessible and searchable.
Kiswahili: Tovuti au ukurasa wa wavuti unapaswa kuwa unaoonekana, unaopatikana na unaoweza kutambuliwa.
Dholuo: Websait kata websait onego obed ma nenore, ma ji nyalo yudo kendo ma inyalo yud.
Somali: Bogga internetka ama bogga internetka waa in uu ahaadaa mid la arki karo, la heli karo oo la raadin karo.

English: At its most basic version, the website or webpage should contain: In addition, the website or webpage can contain a repository where information and evidence related to the action plan (including process and implementation) is publicly stored, organized, updated, and disseminated.
Kiswahili: Katika toleo lake la msingi, tovuti au ukurasa wa wavuti inapaswa kuwa na: Kwa kuongeza, tovuti au ukurasa wa wavuti unaweza kuwa na hifadhi ambapo habari na ushahidi unaohusiana na mpango wa hatua (ikiwa ni pamoja na mchakato na utekelezaji) huhifadhiwa kwa umma, hupangwa, kusasishwa, na kusambazwa.
Dholuo: E yo machuok, websait kata websait onego obed gi: E wi mano, websait kata websait nyalo bedo gi kama inyalo tigo weche kod gik manyiso ni chenro mar tich (makalo chenro kod tich) itiyogo e kano, chano, medo timo lokruok, kendo lando.
Somali: Nooca ugu aasaasiga ah ee bogga internetka ama bogga internetka waa inuu ku kooban yahay: Intaa waxaa dheer, bogga internetka ama bogga internetka waxaa ku jiri kara keyd ku saabsan macluumaadka iyo caddaymaha la xiriira qorshaha ficilka (oo ay ku jiraan geedi socodka iyo hirgelinta) oo si dadweyne loo keydiyo, loo abaabulo, loo cusbooneysiiyo loona faafiyo.

English: To enhance accessibility, the folder can be complemented with a spreadsheet that tracks the commitments and the completion evidence available or, as several OGP participants have done, an online tracking dashboard.The website or webpage and repository should be updated regularly.
Kiswahili: Ili kuongeza upatikanaji, folda inaweza kuongezwa na karatasi ya takwimu ambayo inafuatilia ahadi na ushahidi wa kukamilika inapatikana au, kama washiriki kadhaa wa OGP wamefanya, dashibodi ya kufuatilia mtandaoni.Tovuti au ukurasa wa wavuti na hifadhi inapaswa kusasishwa mara kwa mara.
Dholuo: Mondo omi weche obed mayot chopo, folda mar weche inyalo or gi tab mar kal ma nyiso gik ma ne osingore ni gibiro timo kod gik ma ne osingore ni gibiro chopo kata, kaka joma ne ochokore e OGP mang'eny notimo, dashboard mar luwo weche e intanet.
Somali: Si loo kordhiyo helitaanka, galka waxaa lagu dhammaystiri karaa shaashad ku saabsan ballanqaadyada iyo caddaynta dhammaystirka la heli karo ama, sida ay sameeyeen dhowr ka mid ah ka qaybgalayaasha OGP, dashboard raadraaca internetka.Websaydhka ama bogga internetka iyo kaydinta waa in si joogto ah loo cusbooneysiiyo.

English: For information relating to the co-creation process, it is recommended that updates be updated at least monthly.
Kiswahili: Kwa habari zinazohusiana na mchakato wa uundaji-shirika, inashauriwa kwamba sasisho husasishwa angalau kila mwezi.
Dholuo: Mondo omi omi ng'ato ong'e weche momedore e wi chenro mar chweyo gik moko kanyachiel, ber mondo otim lokruok e weche manyien ma ok ochuno dwe ka dwe.
Somali: Macluumaadka la xiriira habka wada-abuurka, waxaa lagugula talinayaa in la cusbooneysiiyo ugu yaraan bil kasta.

English: For the case of the application, the non-governmental stakeholder must have legal personality, e.g. a legally registered non-governmental organization or civil society organization. 2.
Kiswahili: Kwa kesi ya maombi, mshiriki wa maslahi yasiyo ya kiserikali lazima awe na utu wa kisheria, kwa mfano, shirika lisilo la kiserikali lililoandikishwa kisheria au shirika la jamii ya kiraia. 2.
Dholuo: Kuom wach kwayo, jal ma ok en sirkal nyaka bed gi kido mar chik, kaka riwruok ma ok en sirkal ma osendiko e chik, kata riwruok mar oganda dhano. 2.
Somali: Marka la eego dalabka, daneeyayaasha aan dowliga ahayn waa inay lahaadaan shakhsiyad sharci ah, tusaale ahaan hay'ad sharci ahaan diiwaangashan oo aan dowlad ahayn ama urur bulsho rayid ah. 2.

English: Bryan Port December 9, 2025 at 1:46 pm Reply I head up a monitoring body and have questions, but I am not finding a point of contact that I can engage.
Kiswahili: Bryan Port Desemba 9, 2025 saa 1:46 pm Jibu Mimi kuongoza mwili ufuatiliaji na kuwa na maswali, lakini mimi si kupata uhakika wa kuwasiliana kwamba naweza kushiriki.

English: Chihuahua (Mexico) launched a WhatsApp chatbot that enables residents to quickly and securely report corruption, abuse by public officials, and police misconduct resulting in the expansion of accessible citizen oversight and accountability tools.
Kiswahili: Chihuahua (Mexico) ilizindua chatbot ya WhatsApp ambayo inawawezesha wakazi kuripoti haraka na kwa usalama ufisadi, unyanyasaji wa maafisa wa umma, na tabia mbaya za polisi na kusababisha kupanuliwa kwa zana za urahisi za ufuatiliaji wa raia na uwajibikaji.
Dholuo: Chihuahua (Mexico) ne ochako tiyo gi chatbot mar WhatsApp ma miyo jogweng'o thuolo mar nyiso mapiyo kendo e yo makare kaka mibadhi, timbe maricho mag jotelo mag sirkal, koda timbe maricho mag polise, ma miyo ji yudo thuolo mar tiyo gi yore mang'eny mag rito kendo chiwo dwoko mag penjo.
Somali: Chihuahua (Mexico) ayaa soo saartay chatbot WhatsApp ah oo u oggolaanaya dadka deggan inay si dhakhso leh oo ammaan ah u soo sheegaan musuqmaasuqa, xadgudubyada ay sameeyaan mas'uuliyiinta dawladda, iyo dhaqanka xun ee booliska taas oo keentay in la ballaariyo qalabka kormeerka iyo xisaabinta muwaadiniinta.

English: Kaduna State (Nigeria) is supporting all 23 local governments in co-creating open government action plans to improve primary healthcare through greater citizen participation, transparency, and accountability.
Kiswahili: Jimbo la Kaduna (Nigeria) linaunga mkono serikali zote 23 za mitaa katika kuunda pamoja mipango ya hatua ya serikali ya wazi ili kuboresha huduma ya afya ya msingi kupitia ushiriki mkubwa wa raia, uwazi, na uwajibikaji.
Dholuo: Kaduna State (Nigeria) konyo sirkande duto 23 mag piny e loso chenro mag timo chenro mag sirkal mondo okony e medo konyruok mar thieth e yore madongo kokalo kuom bedo gi thuolo mar bedo gi ji, bedo gi bura, kod bedo gi bura.
Somali: Gobolka Kaduna (Nigeria) ayaa taageera dhammaan 23ta maamul degmo ee dowladda si wadajir ah u abuura qorshe tallaabooyin dowladeed oo furan oo lagu hagaajinayo daryeelka caafimaadka ee aasaasiga ah iyada oo loo marayo ka qaybgalka muwaadiniinta, hufnaanta, iyo xisaabtanka.

English: Dakar (Senegal) has launched the co-creation process for its first Local OGP action plan by establishing a multi-stakeholder technical committee that brings together government and civil society.
Kiswahili: Dakar (Senegal) imezindua mchakato wa kuunda pamoja kwa mpango wake wa kwanza wa hatua wa OGP ya Mitaa kwa kuanzisha kamati ya kiufundi ya washirika wengi ambayo huleta pamoja serikali na jamii ya kiraia.
Dholuo: Dakar (Senegal) osechako chenro mar loso chenro mar timo chenro mar timo chenro mar OGP mar alwora mokwongo kuom chano komiti mar tiegruok mar ji mang'eny ma biro riwo lwedo sirkal kod oganda dhano.
Somali: Dakar (Senegal) ayaa bilaabay habka wada-abuurka qorsheheeda ugu horeysa ee tallaabooyinka OGP ee deegaanka iyada oo la aasaasay guddi farsamo oo ay ka kooban yihiin daneeyayaal badan oo iskugu keena dowladda iyo bulshada rayidka ah.

English: More here . 📘 Discover how Hamburg (Germany) advanced open data governance by combining a participatory mobility information tool with community "Data Dialogues," shifting the administration's internal culture toward greater data literacy and transparency.
Kiswahili: Tafuta jinsi Hamburg (Ujerumani) ilivyosababisha maendeleo katika utawala wa data wazi kwa kuchanganya chombo cha habari cha uhamasishaji wa ushiriki na jamii "Mikataba ya Data", kuhamisha utamaduni wa ndani wa utawala kuelekea ufahamu zaidi wa data na uwazi.
Dholuo: Puonjri weche momedore kae.  Puonjri kaka Hamburg (Germany) ne oloso chenro mar bedo gi data moyangore kuom riwo lwedo chenro mar chiwo weche e wi riwruok mar oganda (participatory mobility information tool) gi chenro mar "Data Dialogues", ma ne miyo kit oganda mar sirkal bedo gi lony e weche mag data kod bedo gi ng'eyo matut.
Somali: Halkan ka sii aqri .  Baro sida Hamburg (Jarmalka) ay horumarisay maamulka xogta furan iyada oo la isku darayo qalab macluumaad oo ku saabsan dhaqdhaqaaqa ka qaybqaadashada "Diallooyinka xogta" ee bulshada, oo u wareejineysa dhaqanka gudaha ee maamulka si loo kordhiyo aqoonta xogta iyo hufnaan.

English: As African Anti-Corruption Day approaches, Nandi County (Kenya) shows how access to information can be a powerful accountability tool.
Kiswahili: Siku ya Afrika ya Kupambana na Ufisadi inakaribia, Kaunti ya Nandi (Kenya) inaonyesha jinsi upatikanaji wa habari unaweza kuwa chombo chenye nguvu cha kutoa hesabu.
Dholuo: Kaka Odiechieng' ma Afrika Kedo gi Mibadhi medo kayo machiegni, County mar Nandi (Kenya) nyiso kaka yudo weche nyalo bedo gima konyo ahinya e miyo ji ochiw paro.
Somali: Maadaama ay soo dhowaaneyso Maalinta Muranka Musuqmaasuqa ee Afrika, Degmada Nandi (Kenya) waxay muujineysaa sida helitaanka macluumaadka uu u noqon karo qalab awood leh oo xisaabinta ah.

English: Through its Open Gov Challenge commitment to enhance access to information and inclusivity, the county is expanding open data, ward-level information hubs, and radio outreach to ensure women, youth, and people with disabilities can monitor government decisions and hold leaders accountable.
Kiswahili: Kupitia ahadi yake ya Open Government Challenge ya kuongeza upatikanaji wa habari na ujumuishaji, kaunti hiyo inaongeza data wazi, vituo vya habari vya kiwango cha wilaya, na ufikiaji wa redio ili kuhakikisha wanawake, vijana, na watu wenye ulemavu wanaweza kufuatilia maamuzi ya serikali na kuwajibika kwa viongozi.
Dholuo: Kokalo kuom chenro mar Open Government Challenge mar medo yudo weche malero weche kod bedo gi thuolo mar timo gik moko duto, county medo medo neno weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero weche malero, koda yore ma miyo mon, rowere, kod joma nigi midekre mag bedo gi midekre nyalo rito yiero mag sirkal kendo keto jotelo mondo obed gi ting'o
Somali: Iyada oo loo marayo ballanqaadkeeda Open Gov Challenge si loo xoojiyo helitaanka macluumaadka iyo ka mid noqoshada, degmadu waxay ballaarinaysaa xogta furan, xarumaha macluumaadka ee heerka degmada, iyo baahinta raadiyaha si loo hubiyo in haweenka, dhalinyarada, iyo dadka naafada ah ay kormeeri karaan go'aamada dowladda oo ay hogaamiyaasha xisaabtanka ka qaadi karaan.

English: Quintana Roo (Mexico) shared progress on key open government commitments during the implementation review of its action plan, including a digital property registry, a budget transparency platform, and upcoming environmental governance milestones linked to the Escazú Agreement.
Kiswahili: Quintana Roo (Mexico) ilishiriki maendeleo katika ahadi muhimu za serikali wazi wakati wa ukaguzi wa utekelezaji wa mpango wake wa hatua, pamoja na rejista ya mali ya dijiti, jukwaa la uwazi wa bajeti, na hatua za mipaka za utawala wa mazingira zinazohusiana na Mkataba wa Escazú.
Dholuo: Piny mar Quintana Roo (Mexico) ne ochiwo paro kuom dongruok ma ne otimore e chopo chenro mag sirkal ma ne ochiwo mar timo lokruok e chenro mar tich, moriwo nyaka loso register mar mwandu mag digital, chenro mar keto weche mag pesa e yo makare, kod chenro mag locho e wi alwora ma biro, ma oriw gi winjruok mar Escazú.
Somali: Quintana Roo (Mexico) waxay wadaagtay horumarka ku saabsan ballanqaadyada muhiimka ah ee dowladda furan inta lagu gudajiray dib u eegista hirgelinta qorsheheheeda ficil, oo ay ku jiraan diiwaanka hantida dhijitaalka ah, barxadda hufnaaninta miisaaniyadda, iyo guulaha socda ee maamulka deegaanka ee la xiriira Heshiiska Escazú.

English: Santa Catarina (Brazil) presented its “Open State” action plan, bringing together the executive, legislative, and judicial branches, along with civil society and academia, under a shared agenda on transparency, participation, accountability, and open justice.
Kiswahili: Santa Catarina (Brazil) iliwasilisha mpango wake wa hatua wa "State Open", unaokuja pamoja na taasisi za utawala, sheria, na mahakama, pamoja na jamii ya kiraia na jamii ya kitaaluma, chini ya ajenda ya pamoja juu ya uwazi, ushiriki, uwajibikaji, na haki wazi.
Dholuo: Santa Catarina (Brazil) ne oloso chenro mar tich mar 'Open State', ma noriwo lwedo bura, bura, kod bura mag sirkal, kaachiel gi riwruok mar oganda dhano kod riwruok mar josomo, e chenro mar timo gik moko e yo makare, e yo ma ok nyis wuondruok, e yo ma ok nyis wuondruok, kendo e yo ma ok nyis wuondruok.
Somali: Santa Catarina (Brazil) ayaa soo bandhigtay qorshe ay ku leedahay "Dawlad furan" oo isu keenaysa qaybaha fulinta, sharci dejinta iyo garsoorka, iyo bulshada rayidka ah iyo bulshada aqooneed, iyada oo ay ku jirto ajandaha wadaaga ah ee hufnaanta, ka qaybgalka, xisaabtanka, iyo cadaalada furan.

English: Osasco (Brazil) kicked off the co-creation process for its second action plan through public workshops and consultations focused on transparency, civic participation, public integrity, and the improvement of digital governance.
Kiswahili: Osasco (Brazil) ilianza mchakato wa kuunda pamoja mpango wake wa pili wa hatua kupitia semina za umma na mashauriano yaliyozingatia uwazi, ushiriki wa raia, utimilifu wa umma, na kuboresha utawala wa dijiti.
Dholuo: Osasco (Brazil) nochako chenro mar loso chenro mar ariyo mar timo gik moko kanyachiel kokalo kuom chokruok mag ji duto kod paro ma ne itimo kuom weche kaka, ng'eyo weche maler, bedo raia, bedo maler e kind oganda, kod medo bedo gi loch e yo ma digital.
Somali: Osasco (Brazil) waxay bilowday habka wada-abuurka qorsheheeda labaad ee ficil iyada oo loo marayo aqoon isweydaarsiyo iyo wadatashiyo dadweyne oo diiradda lagu saaray hufnaan, ka qaybgalka muwaadiniinta, daacadnimada dadweynaha, iyo hagaajinta maamulka dhijitaalka ah.

English: Bogotá (Colombia) opened a call to join the collaborative forum for its second action plan, inviting civil society organizations to help shape, monitor, and participate in decision-making around the city’s open government commitments.
Kiswahili: Bogotá (Colombia) ilifungua wito wa kujiunga na jukwaa la ushirikiano kwa mpango wake wa pili wa hatua, ikialika mashirika ya jamii ya kiraia kusaidia kuunda, kufuatilia, na kushiriki katika kufanya maamuzi karibu na ahadi za wazi za serikali ya jiji.
Dholuo: Bogotá (Colombia) ne ochako kwayo mar riwruok e chokruok mar riwruok mar oganda mang'ongo mar chenro mar ariyo mar timo gik moko, ka ogwelo riwruoge mag oganda mar oganda mondo okony e loso, nono, kendo konyo e kawo paro e wi chenro mag sirkal mar dala.
Somali: Bogotá (Colombia) ayaa furtay wicitaan lagu soo biiro madasha iskaashiga qorsheheeda labaad ee ficil, iyadoo ku casuumay ururrada bulshada rayidka ah inay ka caawiyaan qaabeynta, kormeerka, iyo ka qayb qaadashada go'aamada ku saabsan magaalada ballanqaadyada dowladda furan.

English: More here . 🌐 Representatives from Lisbon (Portugal), Goiás (Brazil), Peñalolén (Chile), NDI, and ICMA exchanged lessons on integrity reforms, procurement oversight, and anti-corruption strategies to strengthen local accountability during a new session of the OGP Local Anti-Corruption Circle.
Kiswahili: Zaidi hapa .  Wajumbe kutoka Lisbon (Portugal), Goiás (Brazil), Peñalolén (Chile), NDI, na ICMA walibadili masomo juu ya mageuzi ya uadilifu, usimamizi wa mikopo, na mikakati ya kupambana na ufisadi ili kuimarisha uwajibikaji wa ndani wakati wa kikao kipya cha Mzunguko wa Mitaa wa kupambana na ufisadi wa OGP.
Dholuo: Joote moa Lisbon (Portugal), Goiás (Brazil), Peñalolén (Chile), NDI, kod ICMA ne oolo puonj kuom lokruok mag luwo tim makare, rito chenro mag yudo gik moko, kod yore mag kedo gi mibadhi mondo gijiw mibadhi mar alwora e kinde chokruok manyien mar OGP Local Anti-Corruption Circle.
Somali: Warar dheeraad ah halkan .  Wakiilada ka socda Lisbon (Portugal), Goiás (Brazil), Peñalolén (Chile), NDI, iyo ICMA waxay is dhaafsadeen casharrada ku saabsan isbeddellada daacadnimada, kormeerka iibsiga, iyo istaraatiijiyadaha la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa si loo xoojiyo xisaabinta deegaanka intii lagu jiray fadhi cusub oo ka socda wareegga deegaanka ee la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa ee OGP.

English: Local leaders, including mayors from Yoff (Senegal) and Ouellé (Côte d’Ivoire), joined government and civil society delegations from countries across the continent to advance a more political, institutional, and regional open government agenda focused on transparency, participation, accountability, and public trust.
Kiswahili: Viongozi wa mitaa, ikiwa ni pamoja na meya kutoka Yoff (Senegal) na Ouellé (Côte d'Ivoire), walijiunga na wawakilishi wa serikali na jamii ya kiraia kutoka nchi kote bara hilo ili kuendeleza ajenda ya serikali wazi zaidi ya kisiasa, taasisi, na kanda inayozingatia uwazi, ushiriki, uwajibikaji, na uaminifu wa umma.
Dholuo: Jotelo mag alwora moriwo meya mag Yoff (Senegal) kod Ouellé (Côte d'Ivoire), noriwore gi jorit sirkal kod riwruoge mag oganda dhano moa e pinje mag Afrika mondo gimi sirkal obed gi loch, riwruok, koda sirkal ma nigi loch e wi weche siasa, kendo ma nigi loch e wi piny mangima, kendo ma nigi paro matut kuom weche ma nyiso ratiro mar loch, bedo gi thuolo mar timo yiero, kendo nyiso ji yie.
Somali: Hogaamiyaasha deegaanka, oo ay ku jiraan duqa magaalada Yoff (Senegal) iyo Ouellé (Côte d'Ivoire), ayaa ku biiray wafdiyada dowladda iyo bulshada rayidka ah ee ka socda dalalka qaaradda oo dhan si ay u horumariyaan ajandaha dowlad furan oo siyaasadeed, hay'adeed iyo gobol oo diiradda saaraya hufnaan, ka qaybgalka, xisaabtanka, iyo kalsoonida dadweynaha.

English: More here . 🌐 The Natural Resource Governance Institute has launched the Changemaker Award to recognize exceptional leaders whose work has advanced natural resource governance through reform, innovation, stronger institutions, or better outcomes for communities.
Kiswahili: Zaidi hapa .  Taasisi ya Utawala wa Rasilimali za Asili imezindua Tuzo ya Changemaker kutambua viongozi wa kipekee ambao kazi yao imeendeleza utawala wa rasilimali za asili kupitia mageuzi, uvumbuzi, taasisi zenye nguvu, au matokeo bora kwa jamii.
Dholuo: Puonj momedore kae.  Institut de la gouvernance des ressources naturelles osechako chiwo mich mar Changemaker Award mondo omi jotelo makende ma tijgi osemiyo loch mar mwandu mag piny omedo bedo maber kokalo kuom lokruok, lony, riwruoge motegno, kata kelo nyak maber ne oganda.
Somali: Halkan ka sii aqri.  Machadka Maamul u sameynta kheyraadka dabiiciga ah wuxuu bilaabay Abaalmarinta Isbedelka si loo aqoonsado hogaamiyaasha caadiga ah ee shaqadooda horumariyay maamulka kheyraadka dabiiciga ah iyada oo loo marayo isbeddelka, hal-abuurka, hay'adaha xooggan, ama natiijooyinka ka wanaagsan bulshada.

English: Tangier-Tétouan-Al Hoceima (Morocco) has launched its Citizen Budget and is co-creating its Regional Disability Plan 2035 with government and civil society to advance inclusive policies, improve services, and strengthen participation for people with disabilities.
Kiswahili: Tangier-Tétouan-Al Hoceima (Morocco) imezindua Bajeti yake ya Raia na inaunda pamoja na serikali na jamii ya kiraia Mpango wake wa Wilaya wa Ulemavu wa 2035 ili kuendeleza sera za pamoja, kuboresha huduma, na kuimarisha ushiriki wa watu wenye ulemavu.
Dholuo: Tangier-Tétouan-Al Hoceima (Morocco) osechako tich mar goyo bajet mar raia kendo en gi chenro mar loso chenro mar bedo gi midekre e alwora mar 2035 gi sirkal kod oganda dhano mondo omi ji duto obed gi chenro mar bedo gi midekre, mondo giti gi yore mabeyo mag konyo ji, kendo mondo giti gi yore mamoko mag konyo ji.
Somali: Tangier-Tétouan-Al Hoceima (Morocco) ayaa bilaabay Miisaaniyadeeda Muwaadiniinta waxayna si wadajir ah ula shaqeynayaan dowladda iyo bulshada rayidka ah u abuureysaa Qorsheeda Gobolka ee naafonimada 2035 si ay u horumariyaan siyaasadaha ka kooban dadka, u wanaajiso adeegyada, u xoojiyaan ka qaybgalka dadka naafada ah.

English: Quezon City (Philippines) has launched open data dashboards providing real-time insights into public programs and spending, enabling citizens to monitor services and hold the government to account.
Kiswahili: Jiji la Quezon (Filipino) limezindua dashibodi za data wazi ambazo hutoa ufahamu wa wakati halisi wa mipango ya umma na matumizi, na kuwawezesha raia kufuatilia huduma na kuwajibika kwa serikali.
Dholuo: Quezon City (Philippines) osechako tiyo gi dashboards mag weche ma ok nyal geng'o weche ma timore e kind ji duto, ma chiwo weche ma nyalo konyo ji ng'eyo chenro mag oganda kod pesa ma gitiyogo, kendo mano miyo ginyalo rito tije mag sirkal kendo miyo sirkal dwoko penjogi.
Somali: Quezon City (Filibiin) ayaa bilaabay shabakado xog furan oo bixiya aragtiyo waqtigeeda dhabta ah ee barnaamijyada dadweynaha iyo kharashyada, taasoo u oggolaaneysa muwaadiniinta inay kormeeraan adeegyada iyo inay xukuumadda xisaabtamaan.

English: More here . 📘 Access the lastest Infrastructure Transparency Index (ITI) assessments from Jalisco (Mexico), Kaduna (Nigeria), and West Nusa Tenggara (Indonesia), featuring practical lessons on how governments are making infrastructure planning, procurement, and project delivery more transparent and accountable.
Kiswahili: Tazama zaidi hapa.  Pata ufahamu wa hivi karibuni wa Tathmini ya Uwazi wa Miundombinu (ITI) kutoka Jalisco (Mexico), Kaduna (Nigeria), na West Nusa Tenggara (Indonesia), na ujifunze masomo ya vitendo kuhusu jinsi serikali zinavyofanya mipango ya miundombinu, mikataba, na utoaji wa miradi iwe wazi zaidi na yenye uwajibikaji.
Dholuo: Yud weche momedore kae.  Yud weche manyien mag nonro mag Infrastructure Transparency Index (ITI) moa Jalisco (Mexico), Kaduna (Nigeria), kod West Nusa Tenggara (Indonesia), manyiso kaka sirkande timo chenro mag chenro mag lowo, yudo gik moko, kod chiwo chenro mag tich mondo obed maler kendo ma nigi ratiro mar chiwo dwoko mag penjo.
Somali: Halkan ka akhriso .  Ka hel qiimeynta ugu dambeysa ee Indekska Farsamaynta Kaabayaasha (ITI) ee ka socda Jalisco (Mexico), Kaduna (Nigeria), iyo Galbeedka Nusa Tenggara (Indonesia), oo ka kooban casharo ku saabsan sida ay dawladuhu u sameeyaan qorshaynta kaabayaasha, iibsiga, iyo bixinta mashaariicda si ka sii hufan oo xisaabtan leh.

English: Register here . 🌐 Explore how local governments are strengthening integrity and preventing corruption from within at the OGP Local Anti-Corruption Learning Circle on May 20.
Kiswahili: Jiandikishe hapa .  Pata kujua jinsi serikali za mitaa zinavyoimarisha uadilifu na kuzuia ufisadi kutoka ndani katika Mzunguko wa Mafunzo wa Mitaa wa kupambana na Ufisadi wa OGP mnamo Mei 20.
Dholuo: Dhi ane e chokruok mar OGP Local Anti-Corruption Learning Circle ma ibiro tim tarik 20 dwe mar Mei mondo ing'e kaka sirkande mag alwora medo jiwo winjruokgi gi Nyasaye kendo geng'o mibadhi.
Somali: Halkan iska qor .  Baro sida dowladaha hoose ay u xoojinayaan daacadnimada iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa gudaha ee Golaha Barashada ee OGP ee la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa ee May 20.

English: Register here . 🌐 The UCLG World Congress will take place from June 22–25, 2026 in Tangier (Morocco), bringing together local and regional governments from around the world.
Kiswahili: Jiandikishe hapa.  UCLG World Congress itafanyika kutoka Juni 2225, 2026 katika Tangier (Morocco), kuunganisha serikali za mitaa na mikoa kutoka duniani kote.
Dholuo: Riwri ane kae.  Chokruok mar Piny mar UCLG biro timore chakre Jun 22 nyaka 25, 2026 e taon mar Tangier (Morocco), kendo obiro choko sirkande mag alwora gi mag alwora e piny mangima.
Somali: Halkan ka diiwaangeliso.  Shirweynaha UCLG ee Adduunka ayaa ka dhici doona 22-25 Juun 2026 magaalada Tangier (Morocco), kaas oo isu keenaya dowladaha deegaanka iyo gobolka ee adduunka oo dhan.

English: The decision formalizes Georgia’s permanent suspension in OGP and closes the Response Policy case. “The Open Government Partnership is rooted in the principle that governments and civil society must be able to work together in an environment that protects fundamental freedoms.
Kiswahili: Uamuzi huo unafanya rasmi kuachishwa kwa Georgia kwa kudumu katika OGP na kuzima kesi ya Sera ya Jibu.
Dholuo: Bura mar Georgia  keto marfuk chuth e OGP kendo tieko kes mar Response Policy.  Riwruok mar Open Government Partnership otenore kuom puonj ni sirkande gi oganda dhano nyaka bed gi nyalo mar tiyo kanyachiel e alwora ma rito ratiro mag dhano.
Somali: Go'aanka ayaa rasmi ka dhigaya Joorjiya's in ay si joogto ah u joojiso OGP, isla markaana lagu xiro kiiska siyaasadda jawaabta.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) is a public body established under Section 3 (1) of the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission Act, 2011.
Kiswahili: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi (EACC) ni shirika la umma lililoanzishwa chini ya Sehemu ya 3 (1) ya Sheria ya Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi, 2011.
Dholuo: Commission for Ethics and Anti-Corruption (EACC) en riwruok mar oganda mang'ongo mochak kaluwore gi Section 3 (1) mar Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission Act, 2011.
Somali: Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa (EACC) waa hay'ad dadweyne oo lagu aasaasay qaybta 3 (1) ee Sharciga Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa, 2011.

English: To combat and prevent corruption, economic crime and unethical conduct in Kenya through law enforcement, prevention, public education, promotion of standards and practices of integrity, ethics and anti-corruption.
Kiswahili: Kupambana na na kuzuia ufisadi, uhalifu wa kiuchumi na tabia isiyo ya maadili nchini Kenya kupitia utekelezaji wa sheria, kuzuia, elimu ya umma, kukuza viwango na mazoea ya uadilifu, maadili na kupambana na ufisadi.
Dholuo: Loso chenro mar tieko mibadhi, ketho chik e yore mag yuto kod timbe maok nyis timbe mabeyo e piny Kenya, kendo geng'o mibadhi, kokalo kuom rito chik, geng'o mibadhi, puonjo ji, jiwo chike kod timbe makare, timbe mabeyo kod kedo gi mibadhi.
Somali: La dagaalanka iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa, dambiyada dhaqaalaha iyo dhaqanka aan anshaxa lahayn ee Kenya iyada oo la adeegsanayo sharciga, ka hortagga, waxbarashada dadweynaha, horumarinta heerarka iyo dhaqanka daacadnimada, anshaxa iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa.

English: To promote integrity and combat corruption through law enforcement, prevention and education.
Kiswahili: Kuendeleza uadilifu na kupambana na ufisadi kupitia utekelezaji wa sheria, kuzuia na elimu.
Dholuo: Jiwo timbe makare kendo kedo gi mibadhi kokalo kuom rito chik, geng'o mibadhi kod tiego ji.
Somali: In lagu horumariyo daacadnimada iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa iyada oo la adeegsanayo sharciga, ka hortagga iyo waxbarashada.

English: The Ethics and Anti- Corruption Commission (EACC) is a statutory body, established under Section 3 of the Ethics and Anti -Corruption Commission Act No. 22 of 2011 pursuant to Article 79 of the Constitution of Kenya.
Kiswahili: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi (EACC) ni mwili wa kisheria, ulioanzishwa chini ya Sehemu ya 3 ya Sheria ya Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi Nambari 22 ya 2011 kulingana na Kifungu cha 79 cha Katiba ya Kenya.
Dholuo: Commission Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) en riwruok mar chike ma ne ochak e bwo Chik mar 3 mar Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission Act No. 22 mar 2011 kaluwore gi Chik mar Kenya namba 79.
Somali: Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa (EACC) waa hay'ad sharci ah, oo lagu aasaasay qaybta 3 ee Sharciga Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa ee 22 ee 2011 iyadoo la raacayo qodobka 79 ee Dastuurka Kenya.

English: The mandate of the Commission is to combat and prevent corruption through: • Preventive measures • Promotion of standards and best practices in integrity and ethics.
Kiswahili: Kazi ya Tume ni kupambana na ufisadi na kuzuia kupitia: • Hatua za kuzuia • Kukuza viwango na mazoea bora katika uadilifu na maadili.
Dholuo: Tij Commission en kedo gi mibadhi kendo geng'o mibadhi kokalo kuom: • Chenro mag geng'o • Jiwo chike kod timbe mabeyo e weche mag tim makare kod timbe mabeyo.
Somali: Amarka Komishanka waa in la dagaalamo musuqmaasuqa loona hortago iyada oo loo marayo: • Tallaabooyinka ka hortagga • Dhiirrigelinta heerarka iyo dhaqanka ugu wanaagsan ee daacadnimada iyo anshaxa.

English: The mandate of the Commission is derived from the provisions of: • Articles 79 and 252 of the Constitution • The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission Act, 2011 • The Leadership and Integrity Act, 2012.
Kiswahili: Amri ya Tume inategemea masharti ya: • Vifungu vya 79 na 252 vya Katiba • Sheria ya Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi, 2011 • Sheria ya Uongozi na Uadilifu, 2012.
Dholuo: Migawo mar Commission en mar: • Sula mag 79 kod 252 mag Constitution • Chik mar Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission, 2011 • Chik mar Leadership and Integrity, 2012.
Somali: Amarka Komishanku wuxuu ka soo jeedaa qodobbada: • Qodobada 79 iyo 252 ee Dastuurka • Sharciga Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa, 2011 • Sharciga Hogaaminta iyo Daacadnimada, 2012.

English: Parliament enacted the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission Act, 2011 and Leadership and Integrity Act, 2012 to provide, inter alia for the functions and powers of the Commission as well as its critical place in the implementation of Chapter Six of the Constitution.
Kiswahili: Bunge lilitangaza Sheria ya Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi, 2011 na Sheria ya Uongozi na Uadilifu, 2012 ili kutoa, kati ya mambo mengine, kazi na mamlaka ya Tume na pia nafasi yake muhimu katika utekelezaji wa Sura ya Sita ya Katiba.
Dholuo: Bura mar Parliament ne oketo Chik mar Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission Act, 2011 kod Chik mar Leadership and Integrity Act, 2012 mondo omi, e kind gik mamoko, tije kod teko mag Commission kaachiel gi kargi maduong' e chopo Sula mar auchiel mar Chike.
Somali: Baarlamaanku wuxuu ansixiyay Sharciga Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa, 2011 iyo Sharciga Hogaaminta iyo Daacadnimada, 2012 si loo siiyo, oo ay ka mid yihiin howlaha iyo awoodaha Guddiga iyo sidoo kale kaalinta muhiimka ah ee ay ku leedahay hirgelinta cutubka Lixaad ee Dastuurka.

English: The Acts are being implemented alongside the Anti-Corruption and Economics Crimes Act (ACECA) of 2003.
Kiswahili: Sheria hizi zinatekelezwa pamoja na Sheria ya kupambana na ufisadi na uhalifu wa kiuchumi (ACECA) ya 2003.
Dholuo: Chikego itimo kanyachiel gi Chik mar Loyo Mibadhi kod Timbe Mahundu e Weche Ohala (ACECA) mar 2003.
Somali: Sharciyada waxaa la hirgeliyay iyadoo la raacayo Sharciga ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa iyo dambiyada dhaqaalaha (ACECA) ee 2003.

English: The mandate of the Commission is to combat and prevent corruption through law enforcement, preventive measures, education and promotion of standards and best practices in integrity and ethics.
Kiswahili: Kazi ya Tume ni kupambana na ufisadi na kuzuia kupitia utekelezaji wa sheria, hatua za kuzuia, elimu na kukuza viwango na mazoea bora katika uadilifu na maadili.
Dholuo: Tij Commission en kedo gi mibadhi kendo geng'o mibadhi kokalo kuom rito chik, timo chenro mag geng'o mibadhi, puonjo ji kendo jiwo chike kod timbe mabeyo mag luwo tim makare kod timbe mabeyo.
Somali: Amarka Komishanku waa in la dagaalamo musuqmaasuqa loona hortago iyada oo la adeegsanayo sharciga, tallaabooyinka ka hortagga, waxbarashada iyo dhiirrigelinta heerarka iyo caadooyinka ugu wanaagsan ee daacadnimada iyo anshaxa.

English: The mandate of the Commission is derived from the provisions of Articles 79 and 252 of the Constitution, The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission Act, 2011, and the Leadership and Integrity Act, 2012.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka ya Tume inategemea vifungu vya Vifungu vya 79 na 252 vya Katiba, Sheria ya Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi, 2011, na Sheria ya Uongozi na Uadilifu, 2012.
Dholuo: Tiego mar Commission en gima ochan e weche manie sula mar 79 kod 252 mar Constitution, The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission Act, 2011, kod Leadership and Integrity Act, 2012.
Somali: Amarka Komishanka waxaa laga soo qaatay qodobbada qodobada 79 iyo 252 ee Dastuurka, Sharciga anshaxa iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa ee Komishanka, 2011, iyo Sharciga Hogaaminta iyo Daacadnimada, 2012.

English: The country’s anti-corruption legislation dates back to 1956 with the enactment of the now defunct Prevention of Corruption Act (formerly Cap. 65, LOK).
Kiswahili: Sheria ya kupambana na ufisadi nchini inarudi nyuma mwaka 1956 na kupitishwa kwa Sheria ya Kuzuia Ufisadi (zamani Cap. 65, LOK).
Dholuo: Chik mar pinyno mar kedo gi mibadhi ne ochakore e higa mar 1956 kane oket Chik mar Rit Mibadhi (ma chon ne iluongo ni Cap. 65, LOK).
Somali: Sharciga la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa ee dalka wuxuu taariikhdu tahay 1956 iyadoo la ansixiyay Sharciga ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa ee hadda la daahfuray (oo horey loo yaqaan 'Cap. 65, LOK').

English: Initially, the Prevention of Corruption Act (Cap. 65) was enforced by the Police Department, notably the Anti-Corruption Squad constituted in 1993.
Kiswahili: Mwanzoni, Sheria ya Kuzuia Ufisadi (Sura ya 65) ilitibiwa na Idara ya Polisi, hasa Kikosi cha Kupinga Ufisadi kilichoundwa mwaka 1993.
Dholuo: Mokwongo, Chik mar Ritruok Richo (Cap. 65) ne itimo gi Dipartimenti mar Polisia, to moloyo, ne itimo gi Pwod mar Kwedo Richo ma ne ochak e higa mar 1993.
Somali: Markii hore, Sharciga ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa (Cap. 65) waxaa fuliyay Waaxda Booliska, gaar ahaan Ciidanka ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa ee la aasaasay 1993.

English: The Squad was however disbanded in 1995 before it could make any significant impact Amendment of the Prevention of Corruption Act (Cap 65, LOK) in early 1997 led to the creation of the Kenya Anti-Corruption Authority (KACA), whose first director was John Harun Mwau.
Kiswahili: Hata hivyo, Kikosi hicho kilirushwa mwaka 1995 kabla ya kuweza kufanya athari yoyote muhimu Marekebisho ya Sheria ya Kuzuia Ufisadi (Cap 65, LOK) mwanzoni mwa 1997 yalisababisha kuanzishwa kwa Mamlaka ya Kupambana na Ufisadi ya Kenya (KACA), ambaye mkurugenzi wake wa kwanza alikuwa John Harun Mwau.
Dholuo: Kata kamano, ne oketh Squad e higa mar 1995 kapok ochopo kama ne onyalo kelo lokruok maduong' e Chik mar Ritruok Mibadhi (Cap 65, LOK) e chak higa mar 1997 ne omiyo ochak Kenya Anti-Corruption Authority (KACA), ma jatendgi mokwongo ne en John Harun Mwau.
Somali: Si kastaba ha ahaatee, kooxda ayaa la kala diray 1995 ka hor inta aysan saameyn weyn yeelan karin Wax ka beddelka Sharciga ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa (Cap 65, LOK) horaantii 1997 wuxuu horseeday abuurista Hay'adda Ka-hortagga Musuqmaasuqa ee Kenya (KACA), oo agaasimihiisii ugu horreeyay uu ahaa John Harun Mwau.

English: The Anti-Corruption Police Unit (ACPU) was created by Executive Order in August 2001.
Kiswahili: Idara ya Polisi ya Kupambana na Ufisadi (ACPU) ilianzishwa na agizo la Utekelezaji mnamo Agosti 2001.
Dholuo: Polise ma kedo gi mibadhi (ACPU) ne ochak gi chik ma ne ochiw e dwe mar Agost 2001.
Somali: Qeybta Booliska La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa (ACPU) waxaa lagu abuuray amar fulin ah bishii Agoosto 2001.

English: ACPU, which operated under the Criminal Investigations Department (CID) of the Police took over KACA’s mantle in September 2001 and performed this function until creation of the Kenya Anti-Corruption Commission (KACC).
Kiswahili: ACPU, ambayo ilifanya kazi chini ya Idara ya Utafiti wa Uhalifu (CID) ya Polisi ilichukua vazi la KACA mnamo Septemba 2001 na ilifanya kazi hii hadi kuanzishwa kwa Tume ya Kupambana na Ufisadi ya Kenya (KACC).
Dholuo: ACPU, ma ne tiyo e bwo Dhipatimenti mar Polise mar Mitiek mag Mahundu (CID) nokawo migawo mar KACA e dwe mar Septemba 2001 kendo notiyo tijno nyaka ne ochak Kenya Anti-Corruption Commission (KACC).
Somali: ACPU, oo ka howlgalaya Waaxda baaritaanka dambiyada (CID) ee Booliska ayaa qabatay xilka KACA bishii Sebtember 2001 waxayna qabatay shaqadan ilaa la aasaasay Guddiga ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa ee Kenya (KACC).

English: KACC was a public body established under the Anti-Corruption and Economic Crimes Act (ACECA) No. 3 of 2003 on 2nd May 2003.
Kiswahili: KACC ilikuwa mwili wa umma ulioanzishwa chini ya Sheria ya kupambana na Ufisadi na Uhalifu wa Kiuchumi (ACECA) No 3 ya 2003 mnamo 2 Mei 2003.
Dholuo: KACC ne en riwruok mar oganda mang'ongo ma ne ochak e bwo Chik mar Loyo Mibadhi kod Mahundu mag Ohala (ACECA) namba 3 mar higa mar 2003 tarik 2 dwe mar Mei 2003.
Somali: KACC waa hay'ad dadweyne oo lagu aasaasay sharciga la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa iyo dambiyada dhaqaalaha (ACECA) ee 2003-kii nambarka 3 ee 2da Maajo 2003.

English: Pursuant to Article 79 of the Constitution, Parliament disbanded KACC on 24th August 2011 through enactment of the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission Act (EACC), 2011.
Kiswahili: Kulingana na Kifungu cha 79 cha Katiba, Bunge lilifukuza KACC mnamo Agosti 24, 2011 kupitia utekelezaji wa Sheria ya Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi (EACC), 2011.
Dholuo: Kaluwore gi Chik 79, Bura mar Parliament ne oketho KACC tarik 24 Agost 2011 kokalo kuom chik mar Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission Act (EACC), 2011.
Somali: Sida ku cad qodobka 79aad ee Dastuurka, Baarlamaanku wuxuu kala diray KACC 24-kii Ogosto 2011 iyada oo la ansixiyay Xeerka Guddiga anshaxa iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa (EACC), 2011.

English: Waqo was sworn in as the Secretary/ Chief Executive at the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC).
Kiswahili: Waqo aliapa kama Katibu / Mkurugenzi Mtendaji wa Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi (EACC).
Dholuo: Waqo ne okuong'ore kaka Secretary/ Chief Executive e Commission for Ethics and Anti-Corruption (EACC).
Somali: Waqo ayaa loo dhaariyay inuu yahay Xoghayaha / Madaxa Fulinta Guddiga anshaxa iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa (EACC).

English: Waqo formally took office at the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) after a swearing-in ceremony held at the Supreme Court of Kenya, on 21st January 2013.
Kiswahili: Waqo alichukua madaraka rasmi katika Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi (EACC) baada ya sherehe ya kuapa iliyofanyika katika Mahakama Kuu ya Kenya, mnamo 21st Januari 2013.
Dholuo: Waqo ne okawo migawo mar Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) bang' timo nyasi mar kwong'ruok e Od Bura Maduong' mar Kenya, tarik 21 Januar 2013.
Somali: Waqo ayaa si rasmi ah ugu xilsaaray Guddiga anshaxa iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa (EACC) kadib xaflad dhaar lagu qabtay Maxkamadda Sare ee Kenya, 21ka Janaayo 2013.

English: Halakhe became the Commission’s first Secretary/Chief Executive Officer and head of the Secretariat, EACC established to replace the Kenya Anti-Corruption Commission in 2012.
Kiswahili: Halakhe akawa Katibu wa kwanza wa Tume/Mkurugenzi Mtendaji Mkuu na mkuu wa Usaidizi, EACC iliyoanzishwa kuchukua nafasi ya Tume ya Kupambana na Ufisadi nchini Kenya mwaka 2012.
Dholuo: Halakhe nobedo Secretary/Chief Executive Officer mokwongo mar Commission kendo jatelo mar EACC ma ne ochak e higa mar 2012 mondo okaw kar Kenya Anti-Corruption Commission.
Somali: Halakhe wuxuu noqday xoghayaha ugu horeeya/Maamulaha guud ee Komishanka iyo madaxa xoghayaha, EACC oo la aasaasay si ay u bedesho Guddiga la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa ee Kenya sanadkii 2012.

English: He has been a member of the Executive Committee of the East African Association of Anti-Corruption Agencies (EAAACA) from September 2015 to date.
Kiswahili: Alifanya kazi katika kampuni ya ujenzi wa vifaa vya ujenzi wa vifaa vya ujenzi wa vifaa vya ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa ujenzi wa
Dholuo: Ne en achiel kuom jokanyo mag Komiti mar Bura Maduong' mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar riwruok mar
Somali: Wuxuu xubin ka ahaa Guddiga Fulinta Ururka Ururada ka hortaga musuqmaasuqa ee Bariga Afrika (EAAACA) laga bilaabo Sebtember 2015 ilaa maanta.

English: Waqo has also undertaken a number of private consultancies including facilitating training on conflict sensitive programming for nongovernmental organizations responding to post election violence in Kenya and conducted civic education training.
Kiswahili: Waqo pia amefanya ushauri kadhaa wa kibinafsi ikiwa ni pamoja na kuwezesha mafunzo juu ya programu nyeti ya migogoro kwa mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali kujibu vurugu baada ya uchaguzi nchini Kenya na kufanya mafunzo ya elimu ya raia.
Dholuo: Waqo bende osetimo chenro mag chiwo paro mag jomoko moriwo tiegruok e wi chenro mag lweny ne riwruoge maok mag sirkal ma timo kaka gidwaro mondo gimi ji thuolo mar yudo kony kuom timbe gero bang' yiero e piny Kenya kendo osetimo tiegruok mar tiegruok mar ji.
Somali: Waqo ayaa sidoo kale sameysay tiro ka mid ah la-talin gaar loo leeyahay oo ay ku jiraan fududeynta tababarka barnaamijyada khilaafaadka u nugul ee ururada aan dowliga ahayn ee ka jawaabaya rabshadaha ka dambeeya doorashada Kenya iyo tababarka waxbarashada rayidka.

English: Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission gathers information on corruption occurring in Government and the public Sector from a variety of sources.
Kiswahili: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi inakusanya habari kuhusu ufisadi unaotokea katika Serikali na Sekta ya Umma kutoka vyanzo mbalimbali.
Dholuo: Bura mar Timbe Malong'o kod Temo Kedo gi Mibadhi, choko weche e wi mibadhi ma timore e sirkal kod e sirkal kuom yore mopogore opogore.
Somali: Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa wuxuu macluumaad ku saabsan musuqmaasuqa ka dhaca dowladda iyo qaybta dadweynaha ka soo ururiyaa ilo kala duwan.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission gathers information on corruption occurring in Government, the public Sector and the private sector from a variety of sources.
Kiswahili: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi inakusanya habari kuhusu ufisadi unaotokea katika serikali, sekta ya umma na sekta ya kibinafsi kutoka vyanzo mbalimbali.
Dholuo: Komiti mar Timbe Malong'o kod Temo Kedo gi Mibadhi, choko weche e wi mibadhi ma timore e sirkal, e sirkal, koda e sirkal kuom yore mopogore opogore.
Somali: Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa wuxuu macluumaad ku saabsan musuqmaasuqa ka dhaca dowladda, qaybta guud iyo qaybta gaarka loo leeyahay ka soo ururiyaa ilo kala duwan.

English: Information can be provided to EACC in writing, by telephone or by presenting it personally to the Commission’s Report Centre at Integrity Centre in Nairobi and and other Regional Offices (Mombasa, Malindi, Machakos, Nakuru, Eldoret, Kisumu, Kisii, Bungoma, Nyeri, Garissa and Isiolo ).
Kiswahili: Habari inaweza kutolewa kwa EACC kwa kuandika, kwa simu au kwa kuwasilisha binafsi kwa Kituo cha Ripoti ya Tume katika Kituo cha Uadilifu katika Nairobi na ofisi nyingine za kikanda (Mombasa, Malindi, Machakos, Nakuru, Eldoret, Kisumu, Kisii, Bungoma, Nyeri, Garissa na Isiolo).
Dholuo: Weche inyalo chiw ne EACC e yo mondiki, e simo kata kuom chiwo wechego e wang' ng'ato owuon ne Commission's Report Centre e Integrity Centre e Nairobi kod kuonde mamoko mag alwora (Mombasa, Malindi, Machakos, Nakuru, Eldoret, Kisumu, Kisii, Bungoma, Nyeri, Garissa kod Isiolo).
Somali: Macluumaadka waxaa loo gudbin karaa EACC qoraal ahaan, taleefanka ama adigoo si shakhsi ah u soo gudbinaya Xarunta Warbixinta ee Komishanka ee Xarunta Daacadnimada ee Nairobi iyo Xafiisyada kale ee Gobolka (Mombasa, Malindi, Machakos, Nakuru, Eldoret, Kisumu, Kisii, Bungoma, Nyeri, Garissa iyo Isiolo).

English: The Commission’s contact details are listed below.
Kiswahili: Maelezo ya mawasiliano ya Tume yameorodheshwa hapa chini.
Dholuo: Weche ma ne okor e wi wach riwruok mar oganda Jehova ne ondik e yo maluwo.
Somali: Macluumaadka xiriirka ee Komishanka waxaa lagu soo koobay hoos.

English: EACC, Report Center Ground Floor, Integrity center, Valley Road/Milimani Road Junction.
Kiswahili: EACC, Ripoti Center Ground Floor, Integrity Center, Valley Road/Milimani Road Junction.
Dholuo: EACC, Report Center Ground Floor, Integrity Center, Valley Road/Milimani Road Junction.
Somali: EACC, Xarunta Warbixinta ee dabaqa dhulka, xarunta Daacadnimada, Valley Road/Milimani Road Junction.

English: To access the individual Court rulings please click on the relevant link on the right.
Kiswahili: Ili kupata hukumu za mahakama binafsi tafadhali bonyeza kiungo cha kufaa kulia.
Dholuo: Mondo iyud weche duto ma Kot osewacho, diher yudo weche ma yudore e ite mar 10 e yo machuok.
Somali: Si aad u hesho go'aamada gaarka ah ee Maxkamadda, fadlan guji xiriirka ku habboon ee midigta.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission is mandated to spearhead the fight against corruption and promote sound ethical standards and practices in Kenya.
Kiswahili: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi ina daraka la kuongoza vita dhidi ya ufisadi na kukuza viwango na mazoea mazuri ya maadili nchini Kenya.
Dholuo: Bura mar Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission nigi migawo mar tayo tij kedo gi mibadhi kendo jiwo chike kod timbe mabeyo e piny Kenya.
Somali: Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa waxaa loo xilsaaray inuu hormuud ka noqdo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa iyo horumarinta heerarka iyo dhaqanka anshaxa ee Kenya.

English: The Commission, in its Strategic Plan 2013-2018, recognizes the need to establish, support and maintain strategic partnership as a key component in the realization of its strategic objectives.
Kiswahili: Katika Mpango wake wa Kimkakati wa 2013-2018, Tume inatambua hitaji la kuanzisha, kusaidia na kudumisha ushirikiano wa kimkakati kama sehemu muhimu katika kutimiza malengo yake ya kimkakati.
Dholuo: E chenro mare mar tiyo gi weche mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda weche mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda weche mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda weche mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda weche mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda weche mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda weche mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda weche mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda mag siasa, weche mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda mag siasa, weche mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda mag siasa, weche mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda mag siasa, weche mag siasa, koda mag siasa, mag siasa, koda mag siasa, mag siasa, koda mag siasa, mag siasa, koda mag siasa, koda mag siasa, mag siasa, koda mag siasa, mag siasa, koda mag siasa, koda mag siasa, mag siasa, koda mag siasa, koda mag siasa, koda mag siasa
Somali: Komishanku wuxuu qorshihiisa istiraatiijiyadeed ee 2013-2018 ku aqoonsan yahay baahida loo qabo in la dhiso, la taageero loona ilaaliyo wada shaqeynta istiraatiijiyadeed oo ah qayb muhiim u ah xaqiijinta himilooyinkiisa istiraatiijiyadeed.

English: The Kenya Leadership and Integrity Forum (KLIF) is a stakeholder’s forum consisting of 15 sectors who are partnering in the fight against corruption and unethical practices in Kenya.
Kiswahili: Jukwaa la Uongozi na Uadilifu wa Kenya (KLIF) ni jukwaa la wadau linajumuisha sekta 15 ambazo zinafanya ushirikiano katika kupambana na ufisadi na mazoea yasiyo ya maadili nchini Kenya.
Dholuo: Kenya Leadership and Integrity Forum (KLIF) en riwruok mar joma ok kal tong' moriwo pinje 15 ma tiyo kanyachiel e kedo gi mibadhi kod timbe maok kare e Kenya.
Somali: Madasha Hogaaminta iyo Daacadnimada Kenya (KLIF) waa madasha daneeyayaasha ka kooban 15 qaybood oo iskaashi ku leh la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa iyo dhaqanka anshaxa la'aanta ah ee Kenya.

English: All the sectors and the respective institutions implementing the KIP align their anti-corruption interventions to the KIP and develop annual action plans and progress implementation reports.
Kiswahili: Sekta zote na taasisi zinazozitolea KIP zinaunganisha hatua zao za kupambana na ufisadi na KIP na huandaa mipango ya kila mwaka ya hatua na ripoti za maendeleo ya utekelezaji.
Dholuo: Sektoro duto kod riwruoge matayo chenro mar kelo lokruok e ngima dhano, tiyo gi chenro mar timo lokruok e ngima dhano mondo gikony e tieko mibadhi, kendo loso chenro mag timo lokruok e ngima dhano, kaachiel gi chiwo ripot mar dongruok ma gitimo e tijno.
Somali: Dhammaan qaybaha iyo hay'adaha ku xiran ee hirgelinaya MAP waxay isugu dheelitiraan tallaabooyinkooda la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa MAP waxayna sameeyaan qorshe tallaabooyin sanadeed iyo warbixino ku saabsan horumarka hirgelinta.

English: These reports provide an opportunity to assess performance and measure impact of the stakeholder’s anti-corruption activities.
Kiswahili: Ripoti hizi hutoa fursa ya kutathmini utendaji na kupima athari za shughuli za kupambana na ufisadi za wanahisa.
Dholuo: Ripotgi chiwo thuolo mar nono tich ma jotelo mag riwruok mar oganda Jehova timo kendo ng'eyo kaka tijgi mar kedo gi mibadhi mulo ngima jogo.
Somali: Warbixinnadaani waxay fursad u siiyaan in la qiimeeyo waxqabadka iyo in la cabbiro saameynta hawlaha la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa ee daneeyayaasha.

English: Democratization on the other hand, has led communities everywhere to clamour for good governance practices that promote the core principals of transparency, accountability, responsibility, inclusion and devolution in national life and the body politic.
Kiswahili: Kwa upande mwingine, demokrasia imewafanya jamii kila mahali kudai mazoea mazuri ya utawala ambayo yanaendeleza kanuni za msingi za uwazi, uwajibikaji, uwajibikaji, ushiriki na uwekezaji katika maisha ya taifa na katika siasa.
Dholuo: Mopogore gi mano, timo dongruok e weche mag siasa osemiyo ji e pinje duto dwaro ni sirkal obed gi loch maber, kendo mondo gikony ji obed gi paro makare, gibed gi bura, gibed gi ting' mar timo gik moko e yo makare, gibed gi paro mowinjore, gibed gi winjruok maber gi oganda, kendo gibed gi winjruok maber gi oganda.
Somali: Dimuqraadiyadaynta dhinaca kale, waxay keentay in bulshooyinka meelkasta ay ku baaqaan dhaqanka maamulka wanaagsan ee dhiirigelinaya mabaadi'da aasaasiga ah ee hufnaan, xisaabtan, mas'uuliyad, ku darista iyo ka qaybgalka nolosha qaranka iyo jirka siyaasadeed.

English: Instrumental in uniting youth in the promotion of ethics, integrity and good governance through: Clubs anticipated to be established in all institutions of learning in Kenya.
Kiswahili: Kuchangia kuunganisha vijana katika kukuza maadili, uadilifu na utawala mzuri kupitia: Makundi yanatarajiwa kuanzishwa katika taasisi zote za elimu nchini Kenya.
Dholuo: Okonyo e riwo ji e riwruok achiel e jiwo timbe mabeyo, luwo tim makare, kod locho maber kokalo kuom: Kinde mag puonjruok e Kenya duto ibiro chak.
Somali: Waxay ka qaybqaataan isbahaysiga dhalinyarada ee horumarinta anshaxa, daacadnimada iyo maamulka wanaagsan iyada oo loo marayo: Kooxaha la filayo in lagu dhiso dhammaan machadyada waxbarashada ee Kenya.

English: Integrity Clubs are governed by an instrument in the Manual known as the Constitution of the Integrity Club.
Kiswahili: Klabu za Uadilifu zinatawaliwa na chombo katika Mwongozo unaojulikana kama Katiba ya Klabu ya Uadilifu.
Dholuo: Klab mag Integrity itimo kaluwore gi gima ondik e Buk Makonyo ma iluongo ni Constitution of the Integrity Club.
Somali: Naadiyada Daacadnimada waxaa maamula qalab ku jira buugga loo yaqaan Dastuurka Naadiga Daacadnimada.

English: The school outreach program entails sensitization on ethics, integrity, and anti-corruption for learners across all levels and teaching staff in institutions of learning across the country aimed at involving them in promoting integrity and corruption prevention.
Kiswahili: Programu ya elimu ya shule inahusisha ufahamu juu ya maadili, uadilifu, na kupambana na ufisadi kwa wanafunzi wa ngazi zote na walimu wa taasisi za kujifunza kote nchini ili kuwahusisha katika kukuza uadilifu na kuzuia ufisadi.
Dholuo: Chenro mar konyo jopuonjre e skul oriwo chiwo paro e wi timbe mabeyo, tim makare, kod kedo gi mibadhi ne jopuonjre e migepe duto kod jopuonj e riwruoge mag tiegruok e piny mangima mondo omigi thuolo mar jiwo tim makare kod geng'o mibadhi.
Somali: Barnaamijka wacyi galinta dugsigu wuxuu ka kooban yahay wacyi galinta anshaxa, daacadnimada, iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa ardayda heerarka oo dhan iyo shaqaalaha waxbarashada ee machadyada waxbarashada ee dalka oo dhan si looga qaybqaato horumarinta daacadnimada iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa.

English: The Commission sponsors the anti-corruption sub-theme during the KNDFF and KNMF.
Kiswahili: Tume inasaidia sehemu ya kupambana na ufisadi wakati wa KNDFF na KNMF.
Dholuo: Kuom ranyisi, e kinde ma ne itimo KNDFF kod KNMF, ne itimo kampen mar kedo gi mibadhi.
Somali: Komishanku wuxuu taageeraa mawduuca hoose ee la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa inta lagu jiro KNDFF iyo KNMF.

English: The establishment of the National Integrity Academy by the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) stems from Commission’s mandate to combat and prevent corruption, economic crime and unethical practices as stipulated in Sections 11 and 13 of the EACC Act, 2011.
Kiswahili: Kuanzishwa kwa Chuo cha Taifa cha Uadilifu na Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi (EACC) hutokana na utume wa Tume ya kupambana na na kuzuia ufisadi, uhalifu wa kiuchumi na mazoea yasiyo ya maadili kama ilivyoainishwa katika Sehemu 11 na 13 za Sheria ya EACC, 2011.
Dholuo: Chenro mar loso National Integrity Academy mar EACC (Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission) en mar kedo gi mibadhi, mahundu mag ohala, kod timbe maok kare kaka ondiki e Sula 11 kod 13 mag EACC Act, 2011.
Somali: Aasaaska Aqoonsiga Qaranka ee Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa (EACC) wuxuu ka yimaadaa amarkii Guddiga ee la dagaalanka iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa, dambiyada dhaqaalaha iyo dhaqanka aan anshaxa lahayn sida lagu qeexay qaybaha 11 iyo 13 ee Sharciga EACC, 2011.

English: Therefore, the National Integrity Academy seeks to fulfil these needs in view of the dynamic nature of knowledge evolution in the area of ethics, governance and anti-corruption.
Kiswahili: Kwa hiyo, Chuo cha Taifa cha Uadilifu kinajitahidi kutimiza mahitaji haya kwa kuzingatia hali ya nguvu ya maendeleo ya maarifa katika nyanja za maadili, utawala na kupambana na ufisadi.
Dholuo: Omiyo, National Integrity Academy dwaro chopo dwaro mag jogo kaluwore gi dongruok mar ng'eyo e weche mag timbe mabeyo, locho e yo maber, kod kedo gi mibadhi.
Somali: Sidaa darteed, Akadeemiyada Qaranka ee Daacadnimada waxay doonaysaa inay buuxiso baahiyahaas iyadoo la tixgelinayo dabeecadda firfircoon ee horumarka aqoonta ee ku saabsan anshaxa, maamulka iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa.

English: In September 2018, the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) embarked on an experiential learning visit of the Independent Commission Against Corruption (ICAC), Hong Kong, a model on best practices for the National Integrity Academy.
Kiswahili: Mnamo Septemba 2018, Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi (EACC) ilianza ziara ya kujifunza ya uzoefu ya Tume ya Kujitegemea ya Kupambana na Ufisadi (ICAC), Hong Kong, mfano wa mazoea bora kwa Chuo cha Taifa cha Uadilifu.
Dholuo: E dwe mar Septemba 2018, Commission for Ethics and Anti-Corruption (EACC) ne otimo limbe mar puonjruok mar nono gima ne otimore ne Commission Independent Against Corruption (ICAC), Hong Kong, ma en ranyisi mar timbe mabeyo mag National Integrity Academy.
Somali: Bishii Sebtember 2018, Guddiga anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa (EACC) wuxuu ku biiray booqasho waxbarasho oo khibrad leh oo uu ku tagay Guddiga Madaxa banaan ee la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa (ICAC), Hong Kong, oo ah qaab lagu daydo dhaqanka ugu wanaagsan ee Akadeemiyada Daacadnimada Qaranka.

English: The team visited the Center for Anti-Corruption Studies and International Training (CACSIT ) that was established under ICAC in 2009 as a research center.
Kiswahili: Timu hiyo ilitembelea Kituo cha Utafiti wa Kupambana na Ufisadi na Mafunzo ya Kimataifa (CACSIT) ambacho kilianzishwa chini ya ICAC mnamo 2009 kama kituo cha utafiti.
Dholuo: Joluo ne odhi limo Center for Anti-Corruption Studies and International Training (CACSIT) ma ne ochak e bwo ICAC e higa mar 2009 kaka kar timo nonro.
Somali: Kooxda ayaa booqday Xarunta Daraasadaha La-dagaalanka Musuqmaasuqa iyo Tababarka Caalamiga ah (CACSIT) oo lagu aasaasay ICAC sanadkii 2009 iyadoo xarun cilmi baaris ah.

English: The Commission identified the CACSIT for the benchmarking visit because the Centre provides training for internal staff and other Anti-Corruption Agencies (ACAs) in the region.
Kiswahili: Tume imeamua CACSIT kwa ajili ya ziara ya kulinganisha kwa sababu kituo hutoa mafunzo kwa wafanyakazi wa ndani na wakala wengine wa kupambana na ufisadi (ACAs) katika mkoa.
Dholuo: Ne oketo chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar timo nonro mar joma ok ni e migawono nikech ne oketo chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar bedo gi chenro mar konyo joma ok ni e migawono.
Somali: Komishanku wuxuu u aqoonsaday CACSIT booqashada isbarbardhiga ah maxaa yeelay xarunta ayaa tababar u siineysa shaqaalaha gudaha iyo hay'adaha kale ee la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa ee gobolka.

English: The National Integrity Academy offers cutting-edge and specialized courses on ethics, integrity and anti-corruption as relates to many professional and functional areas of organizations.
Kiswahili: Chuo cha Taifa cha Uadilifu kinatoa kozi za hali ya juu na maalum juu ya maadili, uadilifu na kupambana na ufisadi kuhusiana na maeneo mengi ya kitaaluma na kazi ya mashirika.
Dholuo: National Integrity Academy chiwo tiegruok mag tiegruok e weche mag timbe mabeyo, timbe makare, kod kedo gi mibadhi kaluwore gi weche mag tich koda tije mag riwruoge.
Somali: Akadeemiyada Daacadnimada Qaranka waxay bixisaa koorsooyin casri ah oo takhasus leh oo ku saabsan anshaxa, daacadnimada iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa oo la xiriira meelo badan oo xirfadeed iyo shaqo oo ururo ah.

English: The courses are designed to respond to the ever-changing anti-corruption and ethics environment and client needs.
Kiswahili: Kozi hizo zimeundwa ili kujibu mabadiliko ya daima ya kupambana na ufisadi na mazingira ya maadili na mahitaji ya wateja.
Dholuo: Tiegogo olos mondo omi omi ji duto obed gi paro mowinjore kuom lokruok ma timore e alwora mar kedo gi mibadhi kod timbe mabeyo, kaachiel gi dwaro mag jorit.
Somali: Koorsooyinka waxaa loogu talagalay inay ka jawaabaan isbeddelka joogtada ah ee deegaanka la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa iyo anshaxa iyo baahiyaha macaamiisha.

English: The uniqueness about the Academy programmes is that participants have the opportunity to interact and learn from renowned anti-corruption, ethics and governance experts and practitioners drawn from the country, region and across the globe.
Kiswahili: Jambo la pekee kuhusu programu za Chuo ni kwamba washiriki wana fursa ya kuingiliana na kujifunza kutoka kwa wataalam na wataalamu mashuhuri wa kupambana na ufisadi, maadili na utawala kutoka nchi, mkoa na ulimwenguni kote.
Dholuo: Gima kende e wi program mag Akademi en ni joma riwo lwedo nyalo tudore kendo puonjore kuom joma olony e kedo gi mibadhi, timbe mabeyo, kod loch, kaachiel gi joma tiyo e tije mag siasa moa e piny mangima.
Somali: Waxyaabaha gaarka ah ee ku saabsan barnaamijyada Akadeemiyada ayaa ah in kaqeybgalayaashu ay helaan fursad ay ku wada falgalaan oo ay wax ka bartaan khubaro iyo xirfadlayaal caan ah oo ka kala socda la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa, anshaxa iyo maamulka oo ka kala yimid dalka, gobolka iyo adduunka oo dhan.

English: The Academy also plans to launch academic programmes on Ethics and Anti-corruption at Certificate, Diploma, Degree and Post- graduate level at an appropriate time.
Kiswahili: Chuo hicho pia kina mpango wa kuzindua mipango ya kitaaluma ya maadili na kupambana na ufisadi katika kiwango cha Cheti, Diploma, Shahada na baada ya kuhitimu kwa wakati unaofaa.
Dholuo: Skul mar skul bende biro chako chenro mar chako chenro mag somo e wi timbe kod kedo gi mibadhi e wi weche mag yudo osuru, diploma, digri kod digri mag ng'ado mag kolej e kinde mowinjore.
Somali: Aqoonsiga ayaa sidoo kale qorsheynaya in waqti ku habboon uu bilaabo barnaamijyo waxbarasho oo ku saabsan anshaxa iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa heerka shahaadada, shahaadada, shahaadada iyo shahaadada ka dambeysa.

English: Curriculum Validation Workshop- 2 October 2018 The Constitution of Kenya provides for public participation in public projects.
Kiswahili: Warsha ya Uhalali wa Mafunzo- 2 Oktoba 2018 Katiba ya Kenya inatoa ushiriki wa umma katika miradi ya umma.
Dholuo: Chokruok mar Puonjruok e Weche Loso Puonjruok - 2 Oktoba 2018 Chik mar Kenya chiwo thuolo mar konyo ji e tije mag sirkal.
Somali: Waxqabadka ansaxinta manhajka- 2 Oktoobar 2018 Dastuurka Kenya wuxuu bixiyaa ka qaybgalka dadweynaha mashaariicda dadweynaha.

English: In respect to this Constitutional requirement, the Academy Team organized for the validation of the Academy Curriculum on 2 October, 2018 at the Kenya Leadership Integrity Offices, Nairobi Business Park.
Kiswahili: Kuhusiana na mahitaji haya ya Katiba, Timu ya Chuo iliandaa uthibitisho wa Kurugenzi ya Chuo mnamo 2 Oktoba, 2018 katika Ofisi za Uadilifu wa Uongozi wa Kenya, Hifadhi ya Biashara ya Nairobi.
Dholuo: Kaluwore gi chik mar Kenya, Komiti mar Puonjruok mar Piny ne ochano mondo okony e loso chenro mar somo mar pinyno tarik 2 dwe mar Oktoba, 2018 e ofis mar Kenya Leadership Integrity Offices, Nairobi Business Park.
Somali: Marka la eego shuruudkan Dastuurka, Kooxda Akadeemiyada ayaa u abaabulay ansaxinta Manhajka Akadeemiyada 2 Oktoobar, 2018 Xafiisyada Daacadnimada Hogaaminta Kenya, Nairobi Business Park.

English: The course received great support from previous Anti-Corruption Directors, senior government officials , consultants and Non-Government Agencies. 2 nd Leadership and Integrity Course The Academy organized the second Leadership and Integrity Course for Executive from 28 th October to 1 st November, 2019 in Naivasha .
Kiswahili: Kozi hiyo ilipokea msaada mkubwa kutoka kwa Wakurugenzi wa kupambana na ufisadi wa zamani, maafisa wakuu wa serikali, washauri na wakala wasio wa serikali. Kozi ya 2 ya Uongozi na Uadilifu Chuo hicho kilifanya kozi ya pili ya Uongozi na Uadilifu kwa Wafanyabiashara kutoka Oktoba 28 hadi Novemba 1, 2019 huko Naivasha.
Dholuo: Puonjruokno ne oyudo kony maduong' ahinya kuom jotelo machon mag kedo gi mibadhi, jotelo madongo mag sirkal, jopuonjre koda riwruoge maok mag sirkal.
Somali: Koorsada ayaa waxaa taageero weyn ka helay Agaasimayaasha la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa ee hore, mas'uuliyiinta sare ee dowladda, la-taliyayaasha iyo hay'adaha aan dawliga ahayn Koorsada Hogaaminta iyo Daacadnimada Koorsada labaad Koorsada Hogaaminta iyo Daacadnimada ee Fulinta ayaa laga qabanqaabiyay 28ka Oktoobar ilaa 1ka Nofeembar, 2019 magaalada Naivasha.

English: Training top leadership on issues of integrity and anti-corruption is critical because of their position and ability to influence.
Kiswahili: Kufundisha viongozi wa juu kuhusu suala la uadilifu na kupambana na ufisadi ni muhimu kwa sababu ya msimamo wao na uwezo wao wa kuathiri.
Dholuo: Tiego jotelo madongo e weche motudore gi wach luwo tim makare kod kedo gi mibadhi en gima dwarore ahinya nikech gibedo gi migawo koda nyalo mar chiko gik ma gitimo.
Somali: Tababarka hoggaamiyeyaasha sare ee arrimaha daacadnimada iyo ka hortagga musuq maasuqa ayaa muhiim ah sababtoo ah booskooda iyo awooda ay ku leeyihiin inay saameyn ku yeeshaan.

English: The participants had very vigorous discussions on the following areas: The course facilitators included: Staff Induction, August 2019 The National Integrity Academy is mandated to carry out internal and external training on Integrity, Ethics and Good Governance.
Kiswahili: Washiriki walifanya majadiliano yenye nguvu sana katika maeneo yafuatayo: Wafanyabiashara wa kozi hiyo walitia ndani: Kuingiza wafanyikazi, Agosti 2019 Chuo cha Kitaifa cha Uadilifu kina wajibu wa kufanya mafunzo ya ndani na nje ya Uadilifu, Maadili na Utawala Mzuri.
Dholuo: Jopuonjre ne owuoyo ahinya e wi weche maluwogi: Jopuonjre ma ne tayo skundno ne gin: Jopuonjre ma ne tiyo e kambi, Agost 2019
Somali: Ka qaybgalayaashu waxay wada hadleen si firfircoon meelaha soo socda: Fududeeyayaasha koorsada waxaa ka mid ahaa: Shaqaalaha soo bandhigida, Agoosto 2019 Akadeemiyada Daacadnimada Qaranka waxaa lagu amray inay fuliyaan tababarka gudaha iyo dibadda ee Daacadnimada, anshaxa iyo Maamul Wanaagsan.

English: The Academy inducted 37 newly recruited staff of the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission at the Kenya Institute of Curriculum Development in August, 2019.
Kiswahili: Chuo hicho kilituma wafanyakazi 37 wapya wa Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Ufisadi kwenye Taasisi ya Maendeleo ya Mafunzo ya Kenya mnamo Agosti, 2019.
Dholuo: Skul mar Kenya Institute of Curriculum Development ne ochako tiyo gi jotich 37 manyien ma ne ochak tiyo e Komiti mar Timbe kod Loyo Mibadhi e dwe mar Agost, 2019.
Somali: Aqoonsiga ayaa 37 shaqaale cusub oo loo soo shaqaaleysiiyay Guddiga anshaxa iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa ka soo galay Machadka Horumarinta Manhajka Kenya bishii Ogosto, 2019.

English: In efforts to address the challenge of corruption and unethical practices in public service, the Ethics and Anti-Corruption has adopted diverse strategies.
Kiswahili: Katika jitihada za kukabiliana na changamoto ya ufisadi na mazoea yasiyo ya maadili katika huduma ya umma, Etika na kupambana na ufisadi imechukua mikakati mbalimbali.
Dholuo: Mondo omi okony e tieko mibadhi kod timbe maok nyis tim makare e tije mag sirkal, Bura mar Timbe Maler kod Lweny gi Mibadhi oseyiero yore mopogore opogore.
Somali: Iyadoo la doonayo in la qabsado dhibaatada musuqmaasuqa iyo dhaqanka anshaxa la'aanta ah ee ka jira adeegyada dadweynaha, anshaxa iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa ayaa qaatay istaraatiijiyo kala duwan.

English: Some of which include, the training of Integrity Assurance Officers (IAOs) and the setting up of Corruption Prevention Committees (CPC).
Kiswahili: Baadhi ya mambo hayo ni mafunzo ya maafisa wa kuhakikisha uadilifu (IAO) na kuanzishwa kwa Halmashauri za Kuzuia Ufisadi (CPC).
Dholuo: Moko kuom gik ma ne otimgo ne gin tiego jotelo ma rito tim makare (I.A.O.) kod chungo komiti mag geng'o mibadhi.
Somali: Qaar ka mid ah waxaa ka mid ah tababarka Saraakiisha Dammaanadda Daacadnimada (IAOs) iyo sameynta Guddiyada Ka Hortagga Musuqmaasuqa (CPC).

English: The National Integrity Academy trains Integrity Assurance officers (IAO) from various public sector institutions to strengthen their capacity to prevent and combat corruption in their institutions.
Kiswahili: Chuo cha Taifa cha Uadilifu kinawazoeza maafisa wa Udhamini wa Uadilifu (IAO) kutoka taasisi mbalimbali za sekta ya umma ili kuimarisha uwezo wao wa kuzuia na kupambana na ufisadi katika taasisi zao.
Dholuo: National Integrity Academy tiego jotelo mag Integrity Assurance (IAO) moa e riwruoge mopogore opogore mag sirkal mondo omed tego nyalo margi mar geng'o mibadhi kendo kedo gi mibadhi e riwruogegi.
Somali: Akadeemiyada Qaranka ee Daacadnimada waxay tababar u siisaa saraakiisha hubinta daacadnimada (IAO) ee hay'adaha kala duwan ee waaxda dadweynaha si loo xoojiyo awoodooda looga hortago iyo la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa hay'adaha ay leeyihiin.

English: It is considered vital since corruption prevention is one of the performance contracting annual targets on which institutions are supposed to report progress on a quarterly basis to EACC.
Kiswahili: Ni muhimu sana kwa sababu kuzuia ufisadi ni moja ya malengo ya utendaji wa mikataba ya kila mwaka ambayo taasisi zinatakiwa kuripoti maendeleo ya kila robo kwa EACC.
Dholuo: En gima dwarore ahinya nikech geng'o mibadhi en achiel kuom chenro mag tich ma jotelo nyaka tim higa ka higa ma onego ochiw ripot ne EACC kuom dongruok ma gitimo.
Somali: Waxaa loo arkaa inay muhiim tahay maadaama ka hortagga musuq maasuqa uu yahay mid ka mid ah ujeedooyinka heshiisyada sanadlaha ah ee waxqabadka ee ay hay'adaha u baahan yihiin inay ku soo wargeliyaan horumarka saddex biloodba mar EACC.

English: Purity Gitonga, The Head of the Academy, thanked the Kilifi County Government for joining hands with NIAca and the EACC in promoting ethics, integrity and anti-corruption in public service.
Kiswahili: Pureity Gitonga, Mkuu wa Chuo hicho, alimshukuru Serikali ya Kaunti ya Kilifi kwa kushirikiana na NIAca na EACC katika kukuza maadili, uadilifu na kupambana na ufisadi katika huduma ya umma.
Dholuo: Purity Gitonga, Jatend Skul, ne opwoyo sirkal mar County Kilifi kuom riwo lwedo NIAca kod EACC e jiwo timbe mabeyo, tim makare kod kedo gi mibadhi e tich mar oganda.
Somali: Purity Gitonga, Madaxa Aqoonsiga, ayaa uga mahadceliyay Dawladda Gobolka Kilifi inay gacanta ku dhigtay NIAca iyo EACC si ay u horumariyaan anshaxa, daacadnimada iyo ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa adeegga dadweynaha.

English: Corruption Prevention in Supply Chain Management The National Integrity Academy (NIAca) held the first Supply Chain Management Course for twenty-three (23) county procurement officers drawn from Ten (10) counties .
Kiswahili: Upinzani wa ufisadi katika usimamizi wa mnyororo wa usambazaji Chuo cha Taifa cha Uadilifu (NIAca) kilifanya kozi ya kwanza ya usimamizi wa mnyororo wa usambazaji kwa maafisa ishirini na watatu (23) wa mikataba ya wilaya kutoka wilaya kumi (10) .
Dholuo: Tiegruok ne mibadhi e locho e ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'iewo ng'ie
Somali: Ka hortagga musuq maasuqa ee maareynta silsiladda sahayda ee lacagaha lacagaha ee National Integrity Academy (NIAca) ayaa qabtay koorso ugu horeeyay ee maareynta silsiladda sahayda lacagaha ee shaqaalaha iibsiga ee degmooyinka 23 ee ka soo jeeda toban (10) degmo .

English: The aim of the training was to equip the participants with knowledge, skills and attitudes on ethics, integrity and anti-corruption competencies required to promote integrity in public procurement.
Kiswahili: Lengo la mafunzo hayo lilikuwa kuwapa washiriki ujuzi, ujuzi na mitazamo kuhusu maadili, uadilifu na uwezo wa kupambana na ufisadi unaohitajika ili kukuza uadilifu katika mikataba ya umma.
Dholuo: Chenro mar tiegruokno ne en chiwo ne joma ne ochokore e chokruogno ng'eyo, lony, koda paro ma ne dwarore kuom weche mag timbe mabeyo, tim makare, kod kedo gi mibadhi mondo omi gibed gi nyalo mar jiwo tim makare e tij loso gik moko.
Somali: Ujeedada tababarka ayaa ahayd in la siiyo dadka ka qaybgala aqoonta, xirfadaha iyo aragtida ku saabsan anshaxa, daacadnimada iyo awoodaha la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa ee looga baahan yahay horumarinta daacadnimada iibsiga dadweynaha.

English: The Course participants were drawn EACC, Ken Gen, Teachers Service Commission (TSC) and the National Anti-Corruption Campaigns Steering Committee.
Kiswahili: Washiriki wa Kozi hiyo walichaguliwa na EACC, Ken Gen, TSC na Kamati ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Kampeni za Kupinga Ufisadi.
Dholuo: Jopuonjre ma ne dhi e skundno ne gin EACC, Ken Gen, Teachers Service Commission (TSC) kod National Anti-Corruption Campaigns Steering Committee.
Somali: Ka qaybgalayaasha koorsada waxaa ka soo qayb galay EACC, Ken Gen, Guddiga Adeegga Macallinka (TSC) iyo Guddiga Hogaaminta Ololaha La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ee Qaranka.
